description:
About the job

Kenvue Is Currently Recruiting For A:

Programa de Interns Kenvue 2026.2 | MARKETING | México - Ciudad de México

What We Do

At Kenvue, we realize the extraordinary power of everyday care. Built on over a century of heritage and rooted in science, we’re the house of iconic brands - including NEUTROGENA®, AVEENO®, TYLENOL®, LISTERINE®, JOHNSON’S® and BAND-AID® that you already know and love. Science is our passion; care is our talent.

Who We Are

Our global team is ~ 22,000 brilliant people with a workplace culture where every voice matters, and every contribution is appreciated. We are passionate about insights, innovation and committed to delivering the best products to our customers. With expertise and empathy, being a Kenvuer means having the power to impact millions of people every day. We put people first, care fiercely, earn trust with science and solve with courage – and have brilliant opportunities waiting for you! Join us in shaping our future–and yours. For more information, click here.

Role Reports To:

SUP REC E SELECAO

Location:

Latin America, Mexico, Distrito Federal, Mexico City

Work Location:

Hybrid

What You Will Do

Encuentra tu futuro en Kenvue

¿Sueñas con trabajar con marcas icónicas que impactan las vidas de millones de personas en todo el mundo todos los días?

¿Tienes pasión por hacer que las cosas sucedan, buscas oportunidades para aprender y crecer con proyectos de alto impacto?

¡Entonces esta es tu oportunidad!

El Programa de Interns de Kenvue está abierto a cualquier persona que quiera trabajar con un propósito en un entorno de innovación y ciencia, con equipos extraordinarios y grandes oportunidades de desarrollo.

¡ Regístrate ahora!

EL PROGRAMA

El Programa de Interns Kenvue es tu puerta de entrada a desafíos reales y a la conexión con excelentes equipos, que garantizan el desarrollo y el aprendizaje profesional.

Nuestro programa cuenta con un plan de desarrollo dedicado a ofrecer una experiencia de aprendizaje completa, alineando la teoría con la práctica.

Esto significa que desarrollarás tus habilidades técnicas e interpersonales en la formación y en la vida cotidiana, ¡con proyectos y desafíos de alto impacto!

Increíble, ¿verdad?

¡Ven a descubrir tu lado extraordinario todos los días! Encuentra tu futuro en Kenvue.

Inicio de la práctica/pasantía: agosto 2026

LOCALIDAD

Ciudad de México – modelo híbrido

BENEFÍCIOS


Beca de apoyo con valor competitivo

Vacaciones

Ser alumno regular universitario con fecha estimada de graduación entre Agosto 2027 y Diciembre 2028.

 Inglés intermedio/avanzado 


ÁREAS DE ATUACIÓN

VACANTE 1

Área: SKIN HEALTH

Descripción:

Estamos buscando un/a practicante de Marketing motivado/a y responsable para unirse a nuestro equipo en Skin Health Brands. Esta posición de medio tiempo ofrece una oportunidad única para adquirir experiencia valiosa en la industria del cuidado de la piel, trabajando de cerca con los Brand Managers.

El/la practicante será responsable de dar seguimiento a diversos proyectos, revisar tendencias de mercado y analizar las ventas y la ejecución en el punto de venta (shopper execution). Este rol es ideal para una persona proactiva, con ganas de aprender y contribuir al éxito de nuestra marca.

Actividades:


Apoyar a los Brand Managers en el seguimiento y gestión de actividades de marketing en curso.
Realizar investigaciones de mercado para identificar tendencias emergentes, preferencias de los consumidores y actividades de la competencia.
Analizar datos de ventas e insights de shopper para respaldar las estrategias de marketing y la toma de decisiones.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para asegurar la ejecución efectiva de las iniciativas de marketing.
Preparar informes y presentaciones que resuman hallazgos, insights y recomendaciones sobre el desempeño de la marca.
Apoyar el desarrollo de materiales de marketing.
Participar en reuniones de equipo y contribuir con ideas para la mejora e innovación de la marca.
Realizar un seguimiento cercano para alcanzar el máximo potencial, apoyando el monitoreo de variables clave como distribución, sell-in y participación de mercado.
Apoyar a los gerentes en actividades clave, alineando esfuerzos entre áreas para asegurar el cumplimiento de procesos y la ejecución completa.


VACANTE 2

Área: Marketing Self-Care

Descripción:

Estamos buscando un/a practicante de Marketing motivado/a y responsable para unirse a nuestro equipo de Self-Care. Esta posición de medio tiempo ofrece una oportunidad única para adquirir experiencia valiosa en la industria OTC, trabajando de cerca con los Brand Managers.

El/la practicante será responsable de dar seguimiento a diversos proyectos, revisar tendencias de mercado y analizar las ventas y la ejecución en el punto de venta (shopper execution). Este rol es ideal para una persona proactiva, con muchas ganas de aprender y contribuir al éxito de nuestra marca.

Actividades:


Apoyar a los Brand Managers en el seguimiento y la gestión de proyectos en curso para las marcas de Self-Care.
Realizar investigaciones y análisis de mercado para identificar tendencias emergentes, preferencias de los consumidores y actividades de la competencia.

Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para asegurar la ejecución efectiva de las iniciativas de marketing.

Apoyar el desarrollo de materiales de marketing junto con el equipo multifuncional.
Participar en reuniones de equipo y contribuir con ideas para la mejora e innovación de la marca.
Realizar un seguimiento cercano para alcanzar el máximo potencial, apoyando a los gerentes en el monitoreo de variables clave como distribución, sell-in, participación de mercado y prescripciones.
Apoyar a los gerentes en actividades clave, alineando esfuerzos entre áreas para asegurar el cumplimiento de los procesos y la ejecución completa.


VACANTE 3

Área:  Shopper Marketing Intern

Jefe: Karen Martinez

Descripción:

El/la Practicante de Shopper Marketing es responsable de apoyar y ejecutar iniciativas estratégicas de marketing para impulsar el engagement del consumidor y aumentar las ventas, colaborando en diversos proyectos y brindando soporte al equipo en la implementación de estrategias.

Actividades:


Desarrollar estrategias innovadoras de shopper marketing para impulsar las ventas y la visibilidad de nuestras marcas.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para la ejecución de campañas de shopper marketing.
Analizar insights del comprador y tendencias del mercado para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento.
Crear experiencias de compra atractivas e interactivas, tanto en canales digitales como físicos.
Colaborar con equipos multifuncionales para desarrollar campañas de shopper marketing que conecten con el público objetivo.
Mantenerse actualizado(a) sobre tendencias de la industria y mejores prácticas en shopper marketing.
Contribuir a la identificación y resolución de incidencias, así como a la mejora del desempeño general de Shopper Marketing.
Investigar e implementar nuevas tecnologías que permitan mejorar la eficiencia en los procesos de desarrollo.

title: Content Creator Education and Marketing Project Intern (TikTok Shop Mexico) - 2026 Start (BS/ MS)
skills: Support the creator education strategy for TikTok Shop, including the design and production of educational content (videos, guides, tutorials) aimed at improving content quality and platform knowledge.

Set up, write, and execute creator communications across channels such as Push, Inbox, WhatsApp, and Email, including copywriting, message setup, and campaign deployment, ensuring proper segmentation, clarity, and performance focus (CTR, OR).
Own the management and day-to-day operations of WhatsApp creator communities, including content sharing, moderation, follow-ups, and coordination around key initiatives.
Collaborate closely with content agencies to coordinate deliverables, review scripts, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with marketing and performance objectives.

Support the execution and follow-up of key TikTok Shop campaigns (e.g., competitions, missions, and special initiatives), ensuring educational and communication materials are correctly implemented across channels.
Research and analyze creator education and marketing strategies from other markets to propose improvements and adaptations.
Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume
Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related major.
Strong interest in digital content, creator marketing, TikTok, and the e-commerce ecosystem.
Solid communication skills, strategic thinking, and a results-oriented mindset.
Experience or strong interest in content production (video, scripting, copywriting), ideally with familiarity with TikTok-style content.
Familiarity with TikTok content ecosystem, shoppable content, and brand-creator partnerships is a plus
description:
About the job

Responsibilities

About the Team

The commerce industry has seen tremendous growth in recent years and has become a hotly contested space amongst leading Internet companies, and its future growth cannot be underestimated. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the commerce channel of choice for merchants, creators, and affiliates.

You've seen the virality and impact of #TikTokMadeMeBuyIt. Come join the team that is helping scale that phenomenon, and pioneer Content & Creator commerce in the LATAM. We aim to bring discovery, inspiration, and joy back to shopping by making TikTok the leading, on-trend commerce platform of choice for brands, creators, and shoppers. We are an entrepreneurial team, passionate about shaping the future of shopping.

The TikTok Shop LATAM operation team aims to deliver high quality products together with a unique customer experience via TikTok. The team is responsible for building the TikTok E-commerce partnership for the TikTok e-commerce business in the US. With more than 1 billion loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join us to build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure and intuitive for our users together.

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 6 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Support the creator education strategy for TikTok Shop, including the design and production of educational content (videos, guides, tutorials) aimed at improving content quality and platform knowledge.
 Set up, write, and execute creator communications across channels such as Push, Inbox, WhatsApp, and Email, including copywriting, message setup, and campaign deployment, ensuring proper segmentation, clarity, and performance focus (CTR, OR).
 Own the management and day-to-day operations of WhatsApp creator communities, including content sharing, moderation, follow-ups, and coordination around key initiatives.
 Collaborate closely with content agencies to coordinate deliverables, review scripts, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with marketing and performance objectives.
 Support the execution and follow-up of key TikTok Shop campaigns (e.g., competitions, missions, and special initiatives), ensuring educational and communication materials are correctly implemented across channels.
 Research and analyze creator education and marketing strategies from other markets to propose improvements and adaptations.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications:


 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume
 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related major.
 Strong interest in digital content, creator marketing, TikTok, and the e-commerce ecosystem.
 Solid communication skills, strategic thinking, and a results-oriented mindset.
 Experience or strong interest in content production (video, scripting, copywriting), ideally with familiarity with TikTok-style content.


Preferred Qualifications:


 Familiarity with TikTok content ecosystem, shoppable content, and brand-creator partnerships is a plus


For TikTok

By submitting an application for this role, you accept and agree to our global applicant privacy policy, which may be accessed here: https://careers.tiktok.com/legal/privacy

Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.

Job Category

Marketing & Communications

Job Details

About Salesforce

Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.

Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.

The Mission

This role sits on the Slack Creative team and partners directly with our Design Director for Brand Systems, Events, and Web — producing programs and projects across all three verticals. While the title is producer, our team plays hybrid roles throughout the course of a project. Some days that looks like strategic program management; other days it's hands-on creative production. The throughline is ownership: you drive the work from kickoff to delivery, whatever shape that takes.

What You’ll Do

These responsibilities span all three verticals — web, brand systems, and events. You'll move between strategic planning and tactical execution depending on what the work needs.

Production & Program Management


Lead project scoping, timeline development, and resourcing across a high volume of simultaneous projects — from small updates to large-scale productions
Define AI forward production strategies and operational frameworks that allow complex work to scale smoothly
Oversee detailed production timelines, project workbacks, and cross-team coordination
Manage agency partners and creative vendors
Anticipate risks, connect silos, socialize changes, and always come with a backup plan


Collaboration & Visibility


Build strong relationships and trust with partner teams, ensuring collaboration at every stage
Drive visibility and clear communication across creative leadership and cross-functional partners
Collaborate with the creative team to translate bold ideas into execution, ensuring the vision comes through in every detail
Serve as the operational hub across internal stakeholders and external partners from kickoff through delivery


AI Implementation & Workflow Design


Develop and implement AI-forward project management workflows and tooling across web, brand, and event workstreams
Identify repeatable processes and build AI-assisted solutions that reduce manual overhead
Build generative workflows for design template production that accelerate output without compromising brand standards


What You Should Bring


Background in corporate events production, including budget management, and vendor sourcing
Experience producing website content across design, engineering, and marketing stakeholders
Hands-on experience with brand systems and design template management
Demonstrated experience implementing AI tools into production or project management workflows
Strategic and creative simultaneously — you hold the vision while managing the details
Calm under pressure- you manage competing priorities in a fast paced environment with good judgment
A clear, confident communicator who earns trust across teams


Why Slack?

At Slack, we're on a mission to make work life simpler, more pleasant, and more productive. Our Brand & Creative team plays a critical role in bringing that mission to life through world-class design and storytelling. You'll have the opportunity to shape how millions of people experience Slack across our digital touch-points.

Our Values


Empathy - We care about the people we work with and the people we serve
Courtesy - We treat each other with respect
Thriving - We create an environment where people can do their best work
Craftsmanship - We take pride in the quality of our work


To Apply

Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief note about why you're excited about this role.

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive workforce.

Unleash Your Potential

When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and be your best, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can do your best. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.

Accommodations

If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.

Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.

Posting Statement

Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Sr. Associate Digital Marketing
skills: Gestionar y coordinar campañas de marketing digital en plataformas como Meta, Google, Paid Search y Retail Media, con foco en conversión, performance y resultados comerciales.
Dar seguimiento a campañas digitales regionales, asegurando la correcta ejecución, optimización y medición de resultados.
Coordinar con agencias creativas y de medios para garantizar la entrega oportuna de materiales, optimización de campañas y cumplimiento de objetivos.
Supervisar estrategias de paid search y retail media, monitoreando desempeño, inversión y KPIs clave.
Apoyar la planeación de medios digitales y generar recomendaciones para la asignación y optimización de presupuesto.
Administrar y dar seguimiento a presupuestos de medios digitales, incluyendo control de inversión, conciliación de facturas y reportes financieros.
Consolidar resultados de campañas, dashboards, scorecards y reportes de performance para generar insights accionables.
Trabajar de forma cercana con equipos de marketing, comercial, e-commerce y agencias en distintos mercados de Latinoamérica.
Asegurar la correcta gestión de activos creativos, tiempos de entrega y aprendizajes derivados del desempeño de campañas.
Licenciatura en Marketing, Comunicación, Administración de Empresas o carrera afín.
Mínimo 2 años de experiencia en marketing digital, e-commerce, performance media o roles similares.
Experiencia gestionando campañas digitales, presupuestos y coordinación con equipos multifuncionales.
Conocimiento sólido de ecosistemas digitales, incluyendo Paid Search, Social Media Advertising y Retail Media.
Experiencia analizando KPIs, dashboards de performance y resultados de campañas.
Capacidad para manejar múltiples prioridades en entornos dinámicos y de alta demanda.

description:
About the job

Estamos en búsqueda de un/a Sr. Associate Digital Marketing para una compañía multinacional de consumo con presencia regional en Latinoamérica.




La posición será responsable de apoyar la estrategia de marketing digital, e-commerce y performance media, impulsando iniciativas enfocadas en generación de tráfico, conversión y aceleración de ventas a través de distintos canales digitales, plataformas de paid media y retail media.




Responsabilidades principales

Gestionar y coordinar campañas de marketing digital en plataformas como Meta, Google, Paid Search y Retail Media, con foco en conversión, performance y resultados comerciales.
Dar seguimiento a campañas digitales regionales, asegurando la correcta ejecución, optimización y medición de resultados.
Coordinar con agencias creativas y de medios para garantizar la entrega oportuna de materiales, optimización de campañas y cumplimiento de objetivos.
Supervisar estrategias de paid search y retail media, monitoreando desempeño, inversión y KPIs clave.
Apoyar la planeación de medios digitales y generar recomendaciones para la asignación y optimización de presupuesto.
Administrar y dar seguimiento a presupuestos de medios digitales, incluyendo control de inversión, conciliación de facturas y reportes financieros.
Consolidar resultados de campañas, dashboards, scorecards y reportes de performance para generar insights accionables.
Trabajar de forma cercana con equipos de marketing, comercial, e-commerce y agencias en distintos mercados de Latinoamérica.
Asegurar la correcta gestión de activos creativos, tiempos de entrega y aprendizajes derivados del desempeño de campañas.




Requisitos

Licenciatura en Marketing, Comunicación, Administración de Empresas o carrera afín.
Mínimo 2 años de experiencia en marketing digital, e-commerce, performance media o roles similares.
Experiencia gestionando campañas digitales, presupuestos y coordinación con equipos multifuncionales.
Conocimiento sólido de ecosistemas digitales, incluyendo Paid Search, Social Media Advertising y Retail Media.
Experiencia analizando KPIs, dashboards de performance y resultados de campañas.
Capacidad para manejar múltiples prioridades en entornos dinámicos y de alta demanda.
Habilidades sólidas de organización, comunicación, seguimiento y gestión de proyectos.
Inglés avanzado indispensable.
Portugués deseable.

title: Business Campaign Strategy Intern
skills: Analyze campaign performance data and generate weekly dashboards and insights that identify trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities, contributing to a 10–20% improvement in campaign KPIs.

Support the planning and execution of cross-channel acquisition and retention campaigns (in-app, push, SMS, paid social), coordinating with product, operations, and creative teams to ensure timely launches and consistent messaging.
Build and maintain audience segmentation and targeting logic using customer and driver behavioral data to improve precision targeting and lift conversion rates by testing new segment strategies.
Develop A/B test plans and track results for creative, channel mix, and incentive structures, documenting learnings and recommending scalable changes to reduce CPA and increase LTV.
Prepare concise business-facing reports and presentation decks that translate campaign findings into actionable recommendations for regional managers and senior stakeholders.
Monitor campaign budget spend and pacing, flagging risks and proposing reallocation strategies to maximize ROI while ensuring compliance with local market guidelines.
Assist in local market research and competitive benchmarking to adapt global campaign frameworks to regional behaviors and regulatory constraints, ensuring relevance and compliance.
Last years of bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Economics, Data Analytics, or a related field is preferred.
Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience using Excel, SQL, or analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau) to manipulate datasets and derive actionable insights.
Proactive, collaborative attitude with experience working in cross-functional teams and the adaptability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.
Attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership, able to manage campaign tracking, budget pacing, and documentation for multiple regional pilots concurrently.
description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

As a BC (Business Campaign) Campaign Strategy Intern at DiDi, you will support the design, execution, and performance analysis of marketing and activation campaigns that drive driver and rider acquisition, retention, and platform engagement across multiple regions. Your work will directly contribute to measurable increases in user activation rates, cost-per-acquisition improvement, and campaign ROI while helping the campaign strategy team scale targeted programs across DiDi’s large, multi-product ecosystem.

In this role, you'll be...


Analyze campaign performance data and generate weekly dashboards and insights that identify trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities, contributing to a 10–20% improvement in campaign KPIs.
Support the planning and execution of cross-channel acquisition and retention campaigns (in-app, push, SMS, paid social), coordinating with product, operations, and creative teams to ensure timely launches and consistent messaging.
Build and maintain audience segmentation and targeting logic using customer and driver behavioral data to improve precision targeting and lift conversion rates by testing new segment strategies.
Develop A/B test plans and track results for creative, channel mix, and incentive structures, documenting learnings and recommending scalable changes to reduce CPA and increase LTV.
Prepare concise business-facing reports and presentation decks that translate campaign findings into actionable recommendations for regional managers and senior stakeholders.
Monitor campaign budget spend and pacing, flagging risks and proposing reallocation strategies to maximize ROI while ensuring compliance with local market guidelines.
Assist in local market research and competitive benchmarking to adapt global campaign frameworks to regional behaviors and regulatory constraints, ensuring relevance and compliance.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Last years of bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Economics, Data Analytics, or a related field is preferred.
Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience using Excel, SQL, or analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau) to manipulate datasets and derive actionable insights.
Proactive, collaborative attitude with experience working in cross-functional teams and the adaptability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced, high-volume environment.
Attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership, able to manage campaign tracking, budget pacing, and documentation for multiple regional pilots concurrently.



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

description:
About the job

About us

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




Our client is a fast-moving US staffing company growing with AI at the core. They're not filling a seat - they're looking for someone who wakes up excited about what AI can do, ships things independently, and makes everyone around them better.




We're being short on purpose. If you need a 3-page JD to get excited, this isn't it.




Who you are?

AI enthusiast: You use AI every day to get real work done - it’s just how you operate.

Sharp, Curious, and Resourceful: Titles and years of experience matter less than strong thinking, fast learning, initiative, and the ability to solve problems independently.
Builders Welcome: Our client values people who can point to real work - portfolios, projects, side hustles, or work samples that demonstrate creativity, execution, and impact. Strong presentation and attention to detail matter.
Tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Zapier are your best friends.




If you're hungry, curious, and can prove it, we want to hear from you!




Are you interested?

description:
About the job

Estoy ayudando a ColJob a encontrar al mejor candidato para unirse a su equipo flexible para el rol de Bilingual Lead Generation Specialist - Construction & Real Estate.




Impulsarás el crecimiento de proyectos premium, conectando con clientes de alto valor y asegurando oportunidades estratégicas.




Compensación:

USD 8 - 12/hora




Ubicación:

Remoto: México




Misión de ColJob:

"To connect businesses with top global talent quickly and reliably, ensuring seamless project continuity through innovative remote work solutions."




¿Qué te hace un candidato ideal?

Eres competente en Lead generation, CRM.
Tienes potencial para desarrollar Venta consultiva, Appointment management.
Español - Conversacional
Inglés - Completamente fluido




Responsabilidades y más:

Appointment Setter (Inglés Avanzado)







📍 Remoto




🕒 10-20 horas por semana




🌎 Clientes en Estados Unidos




💰 8-12 USD/h







Sobre la oportunidad




En ColJob estamos apoyando el proceso de selección para una empresa líder en construcción y arquitectura que desarrolla proyectos residenciales y comerciales de alto nivel.

Buscamos una persona organizada, profesional y con excelentes habilidades de comunicación para gestionar los primeros contactos con potenciales clientes, calificarlos adecuadamente y coordinar reuniones de alta calidad para el equipo comercial.

Si disfrutas interactuar con personas, sabes generar confianza desde la primera conversación y tienes mentalidad orientada a resultados, esta oportunidad puede ser para ti.




¿Cuál será tu misión?




Ser el primer contacto entre la empresa y los potenciales clientes, asegurando una experiencia profesional, cercana y alineada con el posicionamiento premium de la marca.

Tu objetivo principal será identificar oportunidades reales de negocio y convertir el interés inicial en reuniones calificadas para el equipo de ventas.




Responsabilidades







Gestión de Leads




Contactar leads provenientes de Instagram, página web y referidos.

Realizar llamadas de seguimiento de manera oportuna.

Dar seguimiento mediante llamadas y mensajes cuando sea necesario.

Mantener una comunicación constante hasta obtener respuesta.




Calificación de Prospectos




Evaluar aspectos clave como:




Tipo de proyecto (remodelaciones, ampliaciones, patios, ADUs, entre otros).

Presupuesto disponible.

Nivel de interés y urgencia.

Capacidad de toma de decisiones.

Identificar rápidamente cuáles prospectos tienen potencial real para avanzar dentro del proceso comercial.




Agendamiento de Reuniones




Coordinar reuniones estratégicas para el equipo comercial.

Presentar las consultas iniciales como una oportunidad de valor para el cliente.

Gestionar agendas y confirmaciones de manera profesional.

Transmitir sentido de exclusividad y disponibilidad limitada cuando corresponda.




Representación de Marca




Cada interacción debe reflejar:




Profesionalismo.

Organización.

Atención al detalle.

Calidad de servicio.

Posicionamiento premium.




Gestión de CRM




Registrar información de cada lead.

Actualizar estados y seguimientos.

Documentar notas relevantes, objeciones y detalles importantes.

Mantener información organizada y actualizada.




Perfil que buscamos




✅ Inglés avanzado (obligatorio)

✅ Excelentes habilidades de comunicación verbal y escrita

✅ Capacidad para generar confianza rápidamente

✅ Persona organizada, disciplinada y orientada al seguimiento

✅ Mentalidad comercial y enfoque en resultados

✅ Capacidad para escuchar activamente y entender las necesidades del cliente

✅ Profesionalismo y atención al detalle




Experiencia valorada




⭐ Appointment Setting

⭐ Ventas consultivas

⭐ Construcción y remodelaciones

⭐ Bienes raíces

⭐ Servicios premium o de lujo

⭐ Atención al cliente de alto nivel




No buscamos




❌ Perfiles con enfoque agresivo de ventas

❌ Comunicación estilo call center tradicional

❌ Agendadores que prioricen cantidad sobre calidad




Lo que hará destacar tu perfil




Buscamos una persona capaz de conversar con propietarios interesados en desarrollar proyectos importantes, identificar rápidamente si existe una oportunidad real y coordinar reuniones de alto valor mientras proyecta una imagen profesional, confiable y premium de la empresa.




Tu(s) posible(s) líder(es):

Jorge Rios Ortiz - Ingeniero Biomédico



Desired Skills and Experience

Lead generation, CRM, Venta consultiva, Appointment management

title: Marketing & Growth Coordinator
skills: Develop and execute marketing initiatives designed to attract new clients and increase company visibility.
Support pipeline growth through outbound campaigns, targeted outreach, and brand awareness efforts.
Identify and engage industries, markets, and niches aligned with company growth goals.
Help generate inbound business opportunities through consistent and strategic marketing efforts.
Contribute directly to company growth by creating opportunities that lead to new client conversations.
Manage and maintain company social media platforms, including LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and other relevant channels.
Create and publish high-quality content that showcases company activity, hiring successes, operational updates, and client outcomes.
Develop a consistent flow of written, visual, and video-based content.
Monitor engagement, interact with audiences when needed, and maintain an active online presence.
Help strengthen brand awareness and position the company as a trusted partner in the marketplace.
Launch and manage outbound email and messaging campaigns tied to hiring activity, target industries, and company initiatives.
Build, organize, and maintain prospect outreach lists.
Handle inbound marketing inquiries and serve as the first point of contact for prospective clients.
Conduct first-touch discovery calls with potential clients.
Communicate professionally and confidently with U.S.-based business owners and decision-makers.
Develop marketing materials, including presentations, one-pagers, branded collateral, and other business development assets.
Coordinate simple video editing and content formatting.
Support company branding initiatives and ensure consistency across all platforms and materials.
Assist with branded materials, promotional items, and company marketing assets when needed.
Help tell the company's story through content that attracts, engages, and converts prospects.
Work closely with leadership and internal teams to align marketing efforts with company goals and priorities.
Gather updates, success stories, wins, and content from internal departments.
Support company-wide growth initiatives through consistent execution and follow-through.
Help ensure marketing efforts remain aligned with business objectives and growth targets.
Proven experience in marketing, social media management, outbound marketing, lead generation, or related fields.
Demonstrated success growing audiences, increasing engagement, generating leads, or supporting business development efforts.
Ability to showcase previous campaigns, audience growth results, content performance, or measurable marketing outcomes.
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Confidence speaking with U.S.-based business owners and decision-makers.
Experience handling inbound inquiries and conducting initial prospect conversations.
Experience creating content across multiple platforms and formats.
Familiarity with social media management and outbound email marketing.
Basic video editing and content formatting skills are preferred.
Strong organizational skills and exceptional attention to detail.
Ability to manage multiple priorities and execute independently.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where initiative and follow-through matter.
description:
About the job

Great companies don’t grow because they post more content. They grow because the right people notice them.




Every day, potential clients are scrolling, searching, and deciding who they trust.




The challenge isn't getting attention—it's turning attention into conversations, opportunities, and growth.




That's why we're looking for a Marketing & Growth Coordinator who can help us expand our reach, strengthen our brand presence, and create meaningful connections with future clients.




This is a hands-on, execution-focused role that combines content creation, audience growth, outbound marketing, prospect engagement, and first-touch client communication. You'll play a direct role in helping us generate inbound and outbound opportunities while supporting the growth of our business pipeline.




If you're someone who enjoys turning ideas into action, creating engaging content, building relationships, and helping businesses grow, we'd love to meet you.




What You'll Do

Drive Marketing & Growth Initiatives

Develop and execute marketing initiatives designed to attract new clients and increase company visibility.
Support pipeline growth through outbound campaigns, targeted outreach, and brand awareness efforts.
Identify and engage industries, markets, and niches aligned with company growth goals.
Help generate inbound business opportunities through consistent and strategic marketing efforts.
Contribute directly to company growth by creating opportunities that lead to new client conversations.




Build and Grow Our Social Presence

Manage and maintain company social media platforms, including LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and other relevant channels.
Create and publish high-quality content that showcases company activity, hiring successes, operational updates, and client outcomes.
Develop a consistent flow of written, visual, and video-based content.
Monitor engagement, interact with audiences when needed, and maintain an active online presence.
Help strengthen brand awareness and position the company as a trusted partner in the marketplace.




Execute Outbound & Inbound Marketing Efforts

Launch and manage outbound email and messaging campaigns tied to hiring activity, target industries, and company initiatives.
Build, organize, and maintain prospect outreach lists.
Handle inbound marketing inquiries and serve as the first point of contact for prospective clients.
Conduct first-touch discovery calls with potential clients.
Communicate professionally and confidently with U.S.-based business owners and decision-makers.




Create Content That Supports Growth

Develop marketing materials, including presentations, one-pagers, branded collateral, and other business development assets.
Coordinate simple video editing and content formatting.
Support company branding initiatives and ensure consistency across all platforms and materials.
Assist with branded materials, promotional items, and company marketing assets when needed.
Help tell the company's story through content that attracts, engages, and converts prospects.




Collaborate Across the Organization

Work closely with leadership and internal teams to align marketing efforts with company goals and priorities.
Gather updates, success stories, wins, and content from internal departments.
Support company-wide growth initiatives through consistent execution and follow-through.
Help ensure marketing efforts remain aligned with business objectives and growth targets.




What You Bring

Proven experience in marketing, social media management, outbound marketing, lead generation, or related fields.
Demonstrated success growing audiences, increasing engagement, generating leads, or supporting business development efforts.
Ability to showcase previous campaigns, audience growth results, content performance, or measurable marketing outcomes.
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Confidence speaking with U.S.-based business owners and decision-makers.
Experience handling inbound inquiries and conducting initial prospect conversations.
Experience creating content across multiple platforms and formats.
Familiarity with social media management and outbound email marketing.
Basic video editing and content formatting skills are preferred.
Strong organizational skills and exceptional attention to detail.
Ability to manage multiple priorities and execute independently.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where initiative and follow-through matter.




Why This Role Matters

Every marketing campaign, social post, outreach message, and prospect conversation creates an opportunity for growth.

In this role, you'll help shape how our company is seen, how new clients discover us, and how opportunities enter our pipeline. Your work will directly contribute to brand visibility, lead generation, client engagement, and long-term business growth.




If you're excited about combining marketing, content creation, outreach, and relationship-building into a role where your work creates measurable impact, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (Inbound | B2B) - Remote
skills: Executing day-to-day inbound marketing campaigns across email, social media, and content distribution channels.
Managing email marketing programs: newsletter production, lead nurture sequences, list segmentation, and performance reporting.
Scheduling and publishing social media content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and X; managing community engagement and monitoring brand mentions.
Supporting paid media execution by tracking campaign spend, pulling performance reports, and flagging anomalies to the Director of Marketing.
Repurposing existing content (blog posts, case studies, reports) into short-form social posts, email snippets, and other distribution-ready formats.
Maintaining CRM data hygiene: accurate contact records, lifecycle stage updates, and coordination with the sales team on lead handoff processes.
Building and managing landing pages for lead magnets and gated content offers.
Coordinating asset production for campaigns, including liaising with design tools (Canva) and providing creative direction for templates.
Contributing to the development and documentation of SOPs and marketing playbooks for repeatable processes.
Monitoring and reporting on key inbound KPIs: traffic by source, email open and click rates, social engagement, and lead volume.
Staying current on best practices in B2B inbound marketing and surfacing relevant opportunities to the team.
Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

2 to 4 years of hands-on experience executing digital or growth marketing campaigns, preferably within B2B services. Experience managing campaigns personally - not just overseeing them - is essential.
Hands-on experience with email marketing platforms such as HubSpot, Mailchimp, or similar tools.
Proficiency in social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, or similar).
Familiarity with Google Ads and LinkedIn Campaign Manager, including performance reporting.
Working knowledge of CRM platforms and contact data management practices.
Strong written and spoken English; Spanish fluency is essential for this role.
Ability to work independently in a fully remote environment, managing multiple workstreams without close supervision.
Strong attention to detail and a structured approach to organizing tasks and priorities.
Excellent written communication in both English and Spanish, applied directly to campaign copy, email content, and social posts - not just internal communication.
Comfortable being the person who does the work, not just the person who assigns it.
Proactive, ownership-oriented mindset with a consistent follow-through on commitments.
Comfortable navigating ambiguity and building processes in a lean, fast-moving environment.
Data-driven approach: uses metrics to assess what is working and flags what is not.
An AI-first orientation toward problem-solving and workflow efficiency.
Collaborative by nature; comfortable working across time zones and with colleagues in different functions.
Prior experience executing marketing at a B2B services company or within the IT and Engineering staffing industry - ideally in a lean team where you wore multiple hats.
Foundational knowledge of SEO and content marketing best practices.
Experience using Canva or similar tools for content creation and template management.
Familiarity with analytics platforms including Google Analytics 4 and Looker Studio.

description:
About the job

Fast Dolphin is an international staffing company with over two decades of experience specializing in recruiting bilingual and multilingual IT experts across the Americas and providing payroll and customized staffing solutions. Moreover, we take pride in boosting the careers and dreams of our professionals.




Recruiting a Growth Marketing Specialist for a permanent position. Resumes to ligia.padilla@fastdolphin.com




Growth Marketing Specialist

Location: Remote in Latin America (Mexico or Colombia)

Start Date: June 2026 or later, but within 2026

Duration: Permanent

Language: Conversational English




Job Description

We are looking for a hands-on and detail-oriented Growth Marketing Specialist who executes. This is not a strategy-and-delegate role, you will own the day-to-day operation of our inbound marketing function directly: building campaigns, publishing content, managing email programs, maintaining CRM data, and keeping our paid media reporting accurate. You will work closely with the Director of Marketing and be the primary driver of inbound execution as we build this function from the ground up. If you are looking for a team to hand work off to, this is not the right fit. If you thrive doing high-quality work independently in a lean environment, it is.




Compensation

The compensation package is competitive for Growth Marketing roles across Latin America markets and will vary depending on the candidate's location and experience.




Key Responsibilities

Executing day-to-day inbound marketing campaigns across email, social media, and content distribution channels.
Managing email marketing programs: newsletter production, lead nurture sequences, list segmentation, and performance reporting.
Scheduling and publishing social media content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and X; managing community engagement and monitoring brand mentions.
Supporting paid media execution by tracking campaign spend, pulling performance reports, and flagging anomalies to the Director of Marketing.
Repurposing existing content (blog posts, case studies, reports) into short-form social posts, email snippets, and other distribution-ready formats.
Maintaining CRM data hygiene: accurate contact records, lifecycle stage updates, and coordination with the sales team on lead handoff processes.
Building and managing landing pages for lead magnets and gated content offers.
Coordinating asset production for campaigns, including liaising with design tools (Canva) and providing creative direction for templates.
Contributing to the development and documentation of SOPs and marketing playbooks for repeatable processes.
Monitoring and reporting on key inbound KPIs: traffic by source, email open and click rates, social engagement, and lead volume.
Staying current on best practices in B2B inbound marketing and surfacing relevant opportunities to the team.




Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
2 to 4 years of hands-on experience executing digital or growth marketing campaigns, preferably within B2B services. Experience managing campaigns personally - not just overseeing them - is essential.
Hands-on experience with email marketing platforms such as HubSpot, Mailchimp, or similar tools.
Proficiency in social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, or similar).
Familiarity with Google Ads and LinkedIn Campaign Manager, including performance reporting.
Working knowledge of CRM platforms and contact data management practices.
Strong written and spoken English; Spanish fluency is essential for this role.
Ability to work independently in a fully remote environment, managing multiple workstreams without close supervision.
Strong attention to detail and a structured approach to organizing tasks and priorities.




Soft Skills

Excellent written communication in both English and Spanish, applied directly to campaign copy, email content, and social posts - not just internal communication.
Comfortable being the person who does the work, not just the person who assigns it.
Proactive, ownership-oriented mindset with a consistent follow-through on commitments.
Comfortable navigating ambiguity and building processes in a lean, fast-moving environment.
Data-driven approach: uses metrics to assess what is working and flags what is not.
An AI-first orientation toward problem-solving and workflow efficiency.
Collaborative by nature; comfortable working across time zones and with colleagues in different functions.




Additional Qualifications (Preferred)

Prior experience executing marketing at a B2B services company or within the IT and Engineering staffing industry - ideally in a lean team where you wore multiple hats.
Foundational knowledge of SEO and content marketing best practices.
Experience using Canva or similar tools for content creation and template management.
Familiarity with analytics platforms including Google Analytics 4 and Looker Studio.
Knowledge of Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and how LLM-driven discovery affects B2B content strategy is a significant plus.
Portuguese language proficiency is a plus.







If you fulfill this requirement and are interested in this position, please send your resume along with your availability to start in this project, to the following e-mail address: ligia.padilla@fastdolphin.com




Ligia Padilla

Talent Acquisition Lead

Fast Dolphin, Inc.

www.fastdolphin.com

12555 Orange Drive, Suite 4059

Ft. Lauderdale, FL 33330

description:
About the job

Responsibilities

Team Introduction

The e-commerce industry has grown tremendously recently, becoming a hotly contested space among leading Internet companies. Its future growth cannot be underestimated.

With millions of loyal users globally, we believe TikTok is an ideal platform to deliver a brand new and better e-commerce experience to our users. We are looking for passionate and talented people to join our campaign team. Together, we can build an e-commerce ecosystem that is innovative, secure, and intuitive for our users.

Step into a dynamic role with the Mexico operation team, where you'll play a vital part in executing varies campaigns for some of the most iconic brands. Be at the forefront of innovation, contributing to cutting-edge campaigns and driving forward the yearly strategic modules that define success. In this role, you’ll help power the future of e-commerce, supporting high-impact initiatives that connect brands with consumers in meaningful ways. Join us as we shape the future of e-commerce here at TikTok Shop!

As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early.

Successful candidates must be able to commit to at least 3 months long internship period.

Responsibilities:


 Assist in empowering and incubating high-potential e-commerce creators by providing daily support, guidance, and encouragement on content production techniques.
 Actively communicate and build strong, trust-based relationships with creators and agency hosts, ensuring they feel supported and motivated to achieve their sales goals.
 Support the team in matching curated product assortments with the right creators, helping to brainstorm and co-create engaging e-commerce content (short videos & livestreams).
 Help organize and facilitate training sessions for livestream hosts, assisting them in understanding livestreaming tools, refining on-camera scripts, and improving viewer interaction.
 Assist in tracking and analyzing post-livestream data. Help translate these data insights into easy-to-understand, actionable advice that creators can use to optimize their future sessions.
 Guide creators to maintain high-quality content standards and adhere to platform guidelines, fostering a healthy e-commerce ecosystem.


Qualifications

Minimum Qualifications


 Currently pursuing an Undergraduate/Master in Business or a related fields
 Strong skills in interpersonal and communication; you are a "people person" who genuinely enjoys interacting, listening, and building rapport with diverse individuals.
 Proactive fast-learner, open to navigating uncertain and exploratory business scenarios.
 Applicants are kindly requested to submit an English-language resume.
 Proven skills in analytical with a willingness to learn how to use data to formulate actionable strategies.


Preferred Qualifications


 Strong analytical skills, with a structured and critical approach to problem-solving;
 Experience in TikTok platform, short-form video trends, and the livestreaming e-commerce ecosystem.


Job Information

About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.

Diversity & Inclusion

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.

TikTok Accommodation

TikTok is committed to providing reasonable accommodations in our recruitment processes for candidates with disabilities, pregnancy, sincerely held religious beliefs or other reasons protected by applicable laws. If you need assistance or a reasonable accommodation, please reach out to us at https://tinyurl.com/RA-request

description:
About the job

We are one of the fastest-growing private youth sports operators in the GTA and Florida. We delivery high-quality, structured sports programming across multiple locations, with a focus on fun, skills development, and exceptional customer experiences.

This is an entry-level role for someone who has foundational knowledge of email or digital marketing and wants to develop deep expertise in lifecycle campaigns, automation, and data-driven optimization. You will work side by side with the Director of Marketing, building real skills in platforms like Twilio and SendGrid while contributing to campaigns that directly impact customer acquisition and retention.

If you are analytical, curious, detail-oriented, and excited about how data and messaging come together to drive results — we want to meet you.

WHY JOIN US

We are a growing company in the sports industry, and our marketing team is at the core of our expansion. This role is an opportunity to go beyond sending emails — you will learn the strategy, the technology, and the data behind lifecycle marketing at a company that moves fast and values results.


Mentorship from experienced marketers and direct access to senior leadership
Hands-on work with enterprise platforms (Twilio, SendGrid) from day one
A culture that rewards curiosity, precision, and ownership
Flexible remote or hybrid work arrangement
A real growth path toward a full Lifecycle Marketing Specialist or Marketing Analyst role


Key Responsibilities

Campaign Execution & Support


Assist in building, scheduling, QAing, and launching email and SMS campaigns using Twilio and SendGrid under senior supervision
Help set up and QA automated lifecycle flows including onboarding sequences, re-engagement campaigns, retention triggers, and other lifecycle marketing initiatives
Support the management of audience lists, segmentation criteria, suppression files, and workflow documentation
Assist in preparing and formatting email templates in collaboration with the design team
Coordinate campaign timelines, internal deliverables, and marketing calendars to ensure campaigns launch on schedule
Maintain organized libraries of marketing assets, templates, and campaign documentation


Testing & Performance Tracking


Support A/B test setup and help document results for subject lines, CTAs, and content variants
Assist with campaign testing, tracking, and reporting across email and SMS channels
Compile and maintain performance reports tracking key metrics including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and unsubscribes
Assist in identifying trends in campaign data and flagging opportunities for optimization and process improvements


Compliance & Operations


Help ensure all campaigns comply with applicable regulations including CASL, CAN-SPAM, and GDPR
Assist with list hygiene tasks including managing bounces, opt-outs, and suppression lists
Maintain documentation of campaign workflows, platform settings, operational processes, and process guides
Support ongoing improvements to marketing processes and operational workflows


Collaboration


Work closely with the Director of Marketing and senior team members to align on campaign priorities and goals
Coordinate with marketing, design, and content teams to ensure campaigns are executed accurately, assets are delivered on time, and messaging remains on brand
Participate in team meetings, contribute ideas, and ask questions


Requirements

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS


Up to 1-2 years of experience in email marketing, digital marketing, or related roles (internships and relevant coursework count)
Basic familiarity with email marketing concepts: deliverability, segmentation, open rates, click-through rates
Comfortable working with data and digital tools; not afraid of dashboards or spreadsheets
Strong attention to detail: you notice what others miss and take quality seriously
Great written communication skills in English
Eagerness to learn marketing platforms and grow into a technical marketing role
Fluency in English (written and spoken). Spanish is a strong asset


Preferred Skills & Experience


Any hands-on experience with an email platform (Mailchimp, HubSpot, Klaviyo, SendGrid, or similar)
Exposure to SMS marketing or basic understanding of how SMS campaigns work
Familiarity with A/B testing concepts
Basic HTML knowledge or willingness to learn email templating
Studies or coursework in marketing, communications, business, or related fields
Any experience in digital, tech, or startup environments


Benefits

Compensation: $800-1200 USD p/m

description:
About the job

TelevisaUnivision es la compañía de medios en español líder en el mundo, con presencia en plataformas digitales, streaming, redes sociales, audio, televisión lineal y eventos en vivo. Continuamos invirtiendo en nuestro contenido, tecnología y talento, impulsando el crecimiento de nuestra plataforma de streaming ViX.

Buscamos un Coordinador Growth Marketing responsable de liderar iniciativas de marketing de rendimiento basadas en datos que impulsen la adquisición de suscriptores y el crecimiento de las plataformas de streaming de TelevisaUnivision.

Esta posición supervisará la estrategia de inversión en medios pagados, la optimización de campañas y el análisis de desempeño para maximizar el crecimiento de suscriptores y el impacto en resultados de negocio. El rol trabajará de forma cercana con equipos de analítica, marketing, creatividad, producto y marca para asegurar que las campañas estén estratégicamente financiadas, ejecutadas con eficiencia y optimizadas continuamente con base en insights de datos.

About You

Eres un profesional de marketing de rendimiento orientado a datos, con sólidas habilidades analíticas y un profundo entendimiento del ecosistema de medios digitales pagados. Cuentas con experiencia gestionando presupuestos de medios complejos y optimizando estrategias de inversión para maximizar resultados. Utilizas datos, modelos de atribución y análisis de desempeño para guiar decisiones estratégicas de marketing y te desenvuelves con éxito en entornos dinámicos y orientados a resultados.

Trabajas de manera colaborativa con equipos multifuncionales para ejecutar iniciativas de alto impacto y comprendes cómo el marketing de performance contribuye a la adquisición de usuarios y al crecimiento de negocios basados en suscripción dentro del ecosistema de streaming.

Your Day-day


Gestionar el presupuesto de medios pagados para asegurar una asignación eficiente de recursos y maximizar la adquisición y retención de suscriptores.
Analizar modelos de Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), atribución y datos de desempeño para informar decisiones de inversión y planificar estrategias de crecimiento.
Coordinar lanzamientos y proyectos prioritarios para asegurar que las iniciativas de marketing estén estratégicamente financiadas y optimizadas para el desempeño.
Monitorear el desempeño de campañas y realizar ajustes en tiempo real para optimizar la inversión en medios pagados.
Colaborar con los equipos de Marketing Analytics y Business Intelligence para evaluar resultados de atribución y generar recomendaciones basadas en datos.
Evaluar el desempeño de estrategias creativas en canales de performance, identificando oportunidades de optimización en mensajes y formatos.
Trabajar de forma cercana con equipos de creatividad, producto y marca en el desarrollo, prueba y escalamiento de activos creativos de alto rendimiento.


You Have


Licenciatura en Negocios, Marketing o campo relacionado
Mas de 5 años de experiencia en marketing de performance, medios pagados o adquisición digital
Experiencia en negocios digitales basados en suscripción, apps o plataformas de streaming
Conocimiento sólido de KPIs de marketing digital y plataformas de atribución (AppsFlyer, Kochava)
Fuertes habilidades analíticas, planeación estratégica y gestión de presupuestos de medios
Dominio avanzado de Excel y PowerPoint, con capacidad para comunicar insights a nivel ejecutivo
Dominio profesional de inglés y español
Experiencia en streaming, medios digitales o plataformas de suscripción
Familiaridad con Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)
Experiencia trabajando con equipos multifuncionales (analytics, creativo, producto, marca)


Eligibility Requirements


Disponibilidad para trabajar de manera presencial en la oficina de Santa Fe, Ciudad de México.
El empleo y la formación académica estarán sujetos a verificación.
Debe estar autorizado(a) para trabajar a tiempo completo en México.


Our Benefits

En TelevisaUnivision creemos que los colaboradores felices y con un buen equilibrio entre su vida personal y profesional son la base de una cultura organizacional sólida. Ofrecemos una amplia gama de beneficios y prestaciones.

Univision es un empleador que ofrece equidad e igualdad de oportunidades. Todos los solicitantes calificados recibirán consideración para el empleo sin distinción de sexo, identidad de género, orientación sexual, raza, color, religión, origen nacional, discapacidad, estado de veterano protegido, edad o cualquier otra característica protegida por la ley.

description:
About the job

Field Marketing – Senior Consultant – Americas Delivery Mexico (ADMX) 




Are you an experienced, passionate pioneer in technology? A Field Marketing Senior Consultant who wants to work in a collaborative environment? As an experienced Field Marketing Senior Consultant, you will have the ability to share new ideas and collaborate on projects as a consultant without the extensive demands of travel.  Americas Delivery Mexico (ADMX) leverages scale and talent to provide high quality, cost-effective service to our clients.




ADMX is a member of the Global Delivery Network which has presence across the world with Delivery centers in the United States, Romania, India, Spain, China, and the Philippines. ADMX is in Queretaro, Mexico. We provide consulting services to help our clients achieve a higher level of service in operational efficiency and business value. We are a team of professionals passionate about serving clients with distinction and learning, and we are driven by our purpose: Making an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and society.







Work you’ll do/Responsibilities 




As a Senior Consultant, you will work with diverse global clients across a wide range of industries. You will have a variety of client facing responsibilities such as diagnosing issues using advanced analytical techniques, interviewing staff, formulating and making recommendations, and helping clients implement proposed solutions.




End-to-End Campaign & Event Execution: Lead the planning and execution of marketing campaigns and flagship events across digital, in-person, and hybrid formats; support full project delivery including logistics, venue coordination, localization, and execution for the Mexico market.
Executive Programs & Content Development: Support executive-level education programs and content development by adapting global narratives, coordinating keynotes and breakout sessions, and ensuring market relevance for Mexico-based audiences.
Comprehensive Stakeholder Management & Enablement: Act as a central connector across Sales, GVM, Comms, One Google points of contact, partners, activation teams, and clients to drive readiness, alignment, and localized execution.
Pipeline, Lead Generation & Campaign Tracking: Track local campaign and event effectiveness, monitor lead generation and pipeline contribution, and support reporting and continuous optimization.
Budget, Vendor & Operational Management: Coordinate with local suppliers and marketing agencies to ensure timely execution, budget discipline, and post-event operational follow-through.










The Team 




Our Deloitte Customer team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, Generative AI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We can enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital products and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects. Our team balances business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to solve the biggest problems that affect customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce.




Qualifications

Required

6-10+ years of consulting and/or industry experience

description:
About the job

Childfund Work Location  Mexico City, Mexico

 Childfund Division  Global Impact

 ChildFund Department  Country Management

 Job Details 

Position Title:  Fundraising & Marketing Specialist Location: CDMX

ChildFund office: México Manager/Supervisor title: Resource Mobilization Manager

Position type:  Full-time regular Work environment:  Hybrid

About ChildFund

ChildFund is a child-focused international development organization that connects children with the people, resources and institutions they need to grow up healthy, educated, skilled and safe, no matter where they are. We work directly in 23 countries, with extended reach to more than 60 countries through our global partnership network.

ChildFund’s Values

ChildFund values a diverse, equitable, inclusive, and accessible environment where everyone is welcomed and celebrated equally. In our culture of connection, you will have ample opportunity to grow, learn, and lead while contributing your talents and innovations to our inspiring mission.

ChildFund’s Commitment

ChildFund International has a zero-tolerance policy regarding sexual exploitation, abuse and harassment (SEAH) and all other forms of harm by its staff, partners, and other representatives in the delivery of its mission and services for children. ChildFund is committed to creating a safe environment in the workplace as well as in the communities where it delivers programs and services. ChildFund expects every staff member, partner, and representative to adhere to this commitment and to ensure all organizational policies and standards are followed. This position is subject to a range of vetting checks, including a criminal records check and/or disclosure to ensure program participants are safeguarded.

About This Role

To support the organization's financial sustainability through the development of local funds, adding to our Resource Mobilization strategy.

Required Experience And Education


 At least 5 years of proven work experience in the development of marketing, fundraising and social responsibility initiatives. 
 Proven experience in digital marketing strategies. 
 Demonstrated experience in fundraising management, cultivation, development and monitoring strategies. 
 Financial knowledge and participation in budgets. 
 Experience in resource development for children context or other similar field, preferably in an international organization or INGO. 
 Capacity in building long-term win/win strategic relationships. 
 Availability to travel when required. 


Education

Bachelor's degree in Business, Business Administration, Communication, Marketing, Public Relations, or similar. Specialty and/or Master's degree desirable.

Education in Digital Marketing.

100% spoken and written English.

Primary Responsibilities


 Develop and implement fundraising initiatives that include identification, cultivation, attraction and retention of current and potential donors. 
 Establish and execute a digital marketing strategy to distribute content. 
 Maintain CFM digital presence in coordination with the Comms area. 
 Monitor the ROI for marketing campaigns, securing the leads conversion ratio. 
 Responsible from the planning phase as well as production, including service providers in campaign creation and materials development, managing necessary systems (payment gateways, marketing automation platforms, etc.) and the search/purchase of spaces in the media. 
 Ensure brand management to attract and retain individual donors, major donors and corporate donors. 
 Secure the sponsorship required to carry out special fundraising events. 
 Provide regular reports for decision making that include: income from individual donors, ROI by initiative / channel, and brand awareness through internal platforms. 
 Ensure compliance with annual fundraising planning metrics and objectives. 
 Others inherent to the position. 


Required Competencies

ChildFund’s Core Competencies


 Teamwork: the ability to work effectively and collaborate with others; values and respects individual differences. 
 Communication: demonstrates empathy and tact when communicating with others and uses a storytelling approach when appropriate. 
 Results orientation: has the ability to define and meet financial goals; gets things done; takes proactive steps to achieve organizational goals and quality standards. 
 Decision making: uses good judgement, critical thinking, and non-traditional ways to evaluate problems and opportunities; reflects and innovates to improve decisions and outcomes. 
 Resilience: thrives and grows in rapidly changing, demanding, and complex environments. 
 Digital literacy: adopts and champions new technology to relevant contexts, stays aware of technological trends and embraces technological solutions to business challenges. 


Other Required Competencies


 Leadership 
 Accountability 
 Capacity to work in multicultural and matrix organizations. 
 Ability to express and communicate verbally - written and present in front of various audiences. 
 High initiative and proactivity.
