description:
About the job

This role is open to candidates based in LATAM, Africa, and Eastern Europe. Please note that as this role supports U.S.-based clients, candidates must be available to work during U.S. business hours aligned with the client’s time zone.

Our client is a growing commercial and multifamily construction company focused on strengthening its digital presence and increasing visibility across both traditional search engines and emerging AI-powered search platforms. They are seeking an SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist to improve organic search performance, optimize content for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and position the company as an authoritative resource within the construction industry.

Role Overview

The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will be responsible for improving the company's visibility across Google, Bing, and AI-powered search platforms such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will conduct SEO audits, optimize website content and technical SEO, develop search-driven content strategies, implement AEO best practices, and monitor website performance. This role is ideal for someone with strong SEO expertise who is passionate about the future of AI-powered search and enjoys combining technical optimization with content strategy.

Location

Fully Remote (Work from Home)

Key Responsibilities

Search Engine Optimization


Conduct comprehensive SEO audits and identify growth opportunities.
Optimize on-page SEO across key website pages.
Improve metadata, internal linking, site structure, and technical SEO.
Monitor keyword rankings, search visibility, and organic traffic.
Develop and execute SEO strategies that improve search performance.


AI Search & Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)


Implement best practices for AI-powered search optimization.
Optimize website content for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
Research emerging AI search technologies and trends.
Develop strategies that improve authority, relevance, and discoverability across AI platforms.
Monitor visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search channels.


Content Strategy & Optimization


Conduct keyword and topic research.
Develop SEO-driven content calendars and content strategies.
Create content briefs and optimization recommendations.
Improve existing website content to increase search rankings and engagement.
Identify opportunities for new content development.


Website Growth & Performance


Collaborate on website optimization initiatives.
Improve user experience through SEO and content recommendations.
Monitor website analytics and search performance metrics.
Deliver SEO performance reports and recommendations to leadership.


Qualifications Experience


2+ years of experience in SEO.
Experience improving organic rankings and website traffic.
Experience developing SEO content strategies and content optimization initiatives.
Experience conducting SEO audits and technical SEO improvements.
Experience using website analytics and SEO reporting.
Experience within construction, real estate, architecture, engineering, or related industries is a plus.


Qualifications Skills


Strong understanding of modern SEO best practices.
Experience with Google Search Console.
Experience with Google Analytics.
Experience using Ahrefs.
Experience using Semrush.
Experience using Moz.
Experience with WordPress or similar CMS platforms.
Familiarity with AI-assisted content workflows.
Understanding of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
Understanding of AI-powered search trends.
Strong analytical and reporting skills.
Excellent written communication skills.
Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.


What Success Looks Like


Organic traffic and keyword rankings consistently improve.
Website visibility increases across both traditional and AI-powered search platforms.
SEO-driven content generates higher engagement and qualified traffic.
Leadership receives clear reporting and actionable SEO insights.
The company's digital authority continues to grow through effective SEO and AEO strategies.


Opportunity

This is an opportunity to help shape the digital growth strategy of a rapidly expanding construction company while working at the forefront of both traditional SEO and AI-powered search optimization. The SEO & AI Search Optimization Specialist will play a critical role in increasing organic visibility, improving website performance, and preparing the business for the future of search.

Application Process

Fill in the application form
Record a video showcasing your skill sets

title: Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer (LATAM Remote)
description:
About the job

About Selkirk Sport

At Selkirk Sport, we’re passionate about pushing the boundaries of pickleball innovation. Our mission is to Fuel the Pickleball Obsession by creating the sport’s premier products and ecosystem. As a leading global brand in premium pickleball equipment, we’re expanding our international presence and seeking top-tier talent to support our growth in the U.S. and abroad.

We pride ourselves on a culture of excellence, collaboration, and continuous improvement. Selkirk applies first-principles thinking to design scalable, process-driven systems that create lasting operational advantage.

Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer

Location: Fully remote within Latin America

Department: Integrated Marketing

Reports to: Director of Integrated Marketing

The Opportunity

Great marketing is more than creative ideas. It is execution, coordination, and the systems behind the scenes that keep everything moving.

At Selkirk, we are building a modern marketing engine that supports multiple brands, campaigns, and influencer initiatives across a rapidly growing global ecosystem. We are looking for a Marketing Coordinator, Brands & Influencer who thrives in organization, loves bringing order to complexity, and wants a front-row seat to how high-performing campaigns come to life.

This is not a role for someone who simply wants to observe marketing. This is for someone who wants to be in the middle of it. You will help keep campaigns on track, support influencer partnerships, coordinate moving pieces across teams, and become part of the operational engine behind some of the fastest-growing brands in pickleball.

For the right person, this role provides a strong foundation and growth path into future opportunities in campaign management, brand marketing, and influencer partnerships.

What You'll Do

Campaign Coordination & Brand Support

Maintain and manage the master marketing calendar, ensuring teams have visibility into active projects, campaign timelines, and launch priorities

Provide day-to-day support across multiple brands by coordinating tasks, monitoring project updates, and keeping workflows organized and on schedule

Track creative assets through production pipelines and ensure deliverables reach the appropriate teams at the right time

Support consistent campaign execution by following established brand standards, playbooks, and workflows

Influencer Partnerships & Logistics

Own the operational logistics behind influencer gifting and seeding programs, including product coordination, shipment tracking, and documentation

Support creator briefing and content review processes to ensure campaigns continue moving efficiently

Maintain organized records of creator lists, campaign assets, shipping details, and project documentation

Assist in gathering campaign performance information and supporting influencer reporting efforts

Operations & Execution

Support the systems and day-to-day processes that help marketing initiatives scale efficiently

Ensure project updates are clearly communicated across Marketing, Creative, and Media teams

Help identify opportunities to improve organization, streamline workflows, and reduce operational bottlenecks

Contribute to building repeatable systems that support future growth

Who You Are

Operationally Minded: You naturally create structure and enjoy bringing organization to fast-moving projects with multiple stakeholders

Detail Oriented: You notice the small things and understand that successful execution often depends on details others overlook

Collaborative: You communicate effectively and enjoy working across teams and functions

Tech Savvy: You are comfortable learning new tools, systems, and workflows and can adapt quickly in a remote environment

Growth Focused: You are eager to gain exposure across marketing disciplines and excited to build your career within a fast-paced organization

Experienced: You bring 2–5 years of experience in marketing operations, influencer coordination, project support, or high-volume administrative environments

What Success Looks Like

Campaigns remain organized, visible, and on schedule across teams

Influencer gifting and creator programs operate smoothly with minimal logistical issues

Creative assets move efficiently through production and launch processes

Marketing teams have clear visibility into projects, priorities, and timelines

Operational systems continue evolving to support scale and growth

The Details

Compensation: Compensation will be aligned to local market rates and candidate experience within the hiring region.

Location: Fully remote within Latin America.

Why Selkirk

We move fast, think differently, and operate with intention.

This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience inside a growing global brand while helping build the systems and workflows behind large-scale campaigns and influencer initiatives.

If you are energized by organization, excited by marketing, and motivated by helping teams execute at a high level, we'd love to hear from you.

Selkirk is an equal opportunity employer. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete the application or participate in the interview process, please reach out to hr@selkirk.com.

description:
About the job

Description

Amazon Ads helps brands create experiences that delight customers and deliver meaningful results. With 300+ million worldwide active customer accounts, and first-party insights based on shopping, streaming and browsing signals, brands can craft relevant campaigns that enhance customer experiences. Our solutions on Amazon.com, services like Twitch, IMDb T V, Alexa, Amazon Music, and partnerships with third-party publishers and exchanges make Amazon Ads the ultimate amplifier for brands to reach the right audiences in the right places, both on and off Amazon.

We’re looking for a results-oriented Account Manager who is passionate about partnering with our advertisers to make effective, analytically driven marketing decisions. As an Account Manager, you will manage and deliver against difficult advertiser goals and problems to drive revenue and exceed revenue targets. You nurture customer relationships, identify/close revenue driving actions and develop your client’s portfolio. Additionally, you will be able to leverage Amazon’s proprietary data to provide strategic and personalized campaign recommendations to meet your customer’s business goals. This role is highly collaborative, working with Creative, Sales, Product and Retail partners. The Account Manager’s strategic digital expertise is considered critical to unlocking greater value and impact for our advertisers.

Key Responsibilities


 Use knowledge of Amazon Advertising full-funnel ad products and measurement to craft tailored proposals for customers.
 Hit or exceed revenue targets for assigned book of business.
 Achieve assigned non-revenue business objectives and goals.
 Own all facets of the account management process for medium to large accounts, and develop strategic relationships with key points of contact.
 In partnership with the account team, develop annual brand and media strategies that map to customer objectives.
 Use first-party and third-party insights to build pre-flight, in-flight, and post-flight campaign-level recommendations that lead to revenue outcomes or increased customer satisfaction.
 Advocate for customers internally, and utilize internal resources, to drive customer success.
 Educate advertisers on performance metrics, category trends/approaches, and consumer insights using existing and/or customized insights.


Basic Qualifications


 Bachelor's degree in Economics, Marketing, Advertising, Statistics, Engineering, or Business
 Experience in digital advertising and client facing roles
 Experience analyzing data and best practices to assess performance drivers
 Experience with annual brand and media planning
 Experience with Excel


Preferred Qualifications


 Master of Business Administration
 Experience in display advertisement industry
 Experience in omni-channel marketing, search engine marketing or search engine optimization
 Experience in programmatic strategy and implementation


Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.


Company - Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.

description:
About the job

Description

The Consumer Marketing Coordinator will support the execution and operational management of consumer marketing strategies for MAC Cosmetics, ensuring strong alignment between strategy, execution, performance tracking and daily operations. This role is key to the successful implementation of consumer-facing initiatives across social, influencer marketing, CRM, content, PR activations, digital platforms and omnichannel consumer touchpoints.

The role will be responsible for coordinating and executing core consumer marketing processes, supporting campaign development, product launches, always-on brand strategies, and seasonal activations, ensuring consistency with global and regional frameworks while adapting them to local market needs.

This position requires a highly analytical and strategic operational profile, capable of supporting decision-making through data, performance analysis, market insights, and consumer behavior understanding. A key responsibility is the strategic identification, analysis and evaluation of influencer and talent profiles, based on metrics, performance KPIs, audience relevance, brand fit, content quality, business objectives and consumer segmentation, supporting the development of effective influencer and creator strategies.

The Consumer Marketing Coordinator will play a critical role in the execution of influencer marketing, content ecosystems and creator programs, including coordination, briefing, follow-up, content development, approvals, performance tracking, reporting and operational management of collaborations, campaigns and always-on initiatives.

This role will provide direct strategic and operational support to the Consumer Marketing Manager, assisting in planning, execution, coordination, reporting, performance tracking, and day-to-day operational management of the Consumer Marketing area. It will ensure proper follow-up of timelines, workflows, deliverables, approvals, reporting, cross-functional alignment and daily operational continuity.

Key Responsibilities Include


Coordination and execution of social media strategies, content calendars and social cadence
Support in influencer strategy development, talent selection, performance analysis and reporting
Campaign coordination, briefing processes and asset management
Content development workflows and creator ecosystem support
CRM, digital and omnichannel campaign alignment
KPI tracking, reporting, market and competitor analysis
Operational execution, process management and follow-up
Cross-functional coordination with Digital, CRM, PR, E-commerce, Agencies, Corporate and Regional teams
Support in budget tracking, PRs, operational processes and financial coordination related to consumer initiatives


The role contributes to brand growth by strengthening consumer acquisition, engagement, conversion and retention strategies, ensuring disciplined execution, operational excellence and performance-driven decision-making across all consumer marketing initiatives.

This is a cross-functional, execution-driven, analytical and strategically supportive role, essential for scaling the Consumer Marketing function and enabling high-impact brand activation.

description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity

The Account Executive plays a pivotal role in connecting the Creative and Brand teams, ensuring seamless communication and project delivery. This position demands exceptional project management, organization, and data understanding skills.

As the face of the in-house Content Development team for the North America sector, the Account Executive drives the creative adaptation of multiple communication assets in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

Success in this role requires a detail-oriented, collaborative, and client-focused mindset. Someone who thrives on building trust, managing complexity, and delivering excellence under pressure.

Your Impact

As Account Executive your responsibilities would consist of:


Manage the end-to-end process of multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and quality standards are met.
Lead the end-to-end workflow by coordinating with all teams involved to ensure smooth project execution.
Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels (from interns to senior leadership) to support the development of creative campaigns.
Track and manage internal project processes using tools such as Excel trackers and Monday.com, and lead regular status updates with project managers and the creative team.
Assist in the development of reports and project documentation.


Qualifications

Who Are We Looking For?


Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration/Marketing/Communication (foundation for analytical and strategic thinking).
Bilingual proficiency (English & Spanish).
Mid Level knowledge of Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, SharePoint.
Proven capability to translate data into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making.


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements.

What can you expect from us:


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

description:
About the job

About us

At Near, we help top talent in Latin America find remote roles with US companies. Our mission is to create better lives by fostering a remote work culture that transcends borders.




Our client is a fast-moving US staffing company growing with AI at the core. They're not filling a seat - they're looking for someone who wakes up excited about what AI can do, ships things independently, and makes everyone around them better.




We're being short on purpose. If you need a 3-page JD to get excited, this isn't it.




Who you are?

AI enthusiast: You use AI every day to get real work done - it’s just how you operate.
High-Impact Operator: Our client is looking for people who move fast, execute well, and consistently deliver results.
Exceptional in Your Craft: Whether your background is in marketing, sales, operations, finance, design, or another field, you should be able to clearly show ownership and end-to-end execution in your work.
Sharp, Curious, and Resourceful: Titles and years of experience matter less than strong thinking, fast learning, initiative, and the ability to solve problems independently.
Builders Welcome: Our client values people who can point to real work - portfolios, projects, side hustles, or work samples that demonstrate creativity, execution, and impact. Strong presentation and attention to detail matter.
Tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Zapier are your best friends.




If you're hungry, curious, and can prove it, we want to hear from you!

title: Desarrollador GO SENIOR
description:
About the job

🚀 Estamos buscando en Devthion

Ingeniero/a de Software Senior — Go / Backend




¿De qué se trata? Vas a diseñar y construir microservicios de alto rendimiento en Go, liderando la arquitectura de sistemas distribuidos, escalables y resilientes. Vas a tomar decisiones técnicas que importan, hacer Code Review y mentorear al equipo, integrando herramientas de IA (Claude Code, Gemini, etc.) en el flujo de trabajo para elevar la productividad y calidad del software.




Stack principal:

- Go (goroutines, channels, context, profiling, optimización de memoria)

- APIs REST con OpenAPI / Swagger

- Autenticación y seguridad (JWT, OAuth, rate limiting)

- Clean Architecture + DDD

- PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite + Redis para caching

- Mensajería (RabbitMQ, Kafka o similares)

- Docker + scripting en Bash + SSH

- Testing (unitarias, integración, mocks)

 - Git / GitLab con Code Review

- Observabilidad: logs, métricas y tracing




Suma puntos (pero no es excluyente): Kubernetes, pipelines CI/CD, administración avanzada de Linux.




Condiciones: 

📍 México (CDMX)- esquema presencial. 

💵 Contractor, remuneración en USD (a definir según seniority). 

♾️ Relación indefinida, sujeta a cumplimiento de expectativas.

description:
About the job

Job Description

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing Product Management team within UL Solutions Retail and Consumer Product team. We are a proactive and dynamic group, with strong growth goals and an equally strong work ethic! Bring your skills to this team and let's grow together! As part of global Product Management team, support the business success of new services and drive growth and improvement of existing service portfolio. Collaborate and support across the product management team, with exposure across retail focused initiatives as well as sustainability focused initiatives.

Works independently; receives minimal guidance to execute go-to-market plans including: crafting messaging that attracts and converts prospects and leads; creating sales materials to facilitate positive client experience; and executing against launch plans that outline in detail how products are promoted and sold.

Responsibilities


Collaborate with Product Management team to understand the competitive landscape and drive demand in line with business goals. Executes client acquisition and retention strategies to drive business growth. 
Supports market and trend research efforts to identify new opportunities and ensure products and messages are properly targeted. Gathers insights to influence business decisions and shape Product Management strategy. 
Works with guidance to craft compelling content to drive product awareness and purchase. 
Works with guidance to create compelling content to ensure that sales have the knowledge required to effectively sell product offerings. Partners with sales to foster a continuous feedback loop. 
Contributes to business success by performing other tasks as required
Read and follow the Underwriters Laboratories Code of Conduct, and follow all physical and digital security practices


Qualifications

MINIMUM KNOWLEDGE PREFERRED.


Generally, 3-5 years or more of related experience or demonstrated competency. 


Minimum Skills Preferred.


Strong writing and presentation skills. 
Collaboration Basic project planning and management. 
Customer-centric orientation. 
Interviewing. 
Budget tracking. 
Analytical skills. 
We are a global team that conducts business with English as our primary common language, so candidate must be a fluent English speaker and writer. 


Minimum Abilities Preferred.


Able to understand technical and scientific issues and to translate complex information for nonscientific audiences. 
Proficiency in Microsoft Office and experience managing and/or using a wide array of internal communication tools. 


About Us

A global leader in applied safety science, UL Solutions (NYSE: ULS) transforms safety, security and sustainability challenges into opportunities for customers in more than 110 countries. UL Solutions delivers testing, inspection and certification services, together with software products and advisory offerings, that support our customers’ product innovation and business growth. The UL Mark serves as a recognized symbol of trust in our customers’ products and reflects an unwavering commitment to advancing our safety mission. We help our customers innovate, launch new products and services, navigate global markets and complex supply chains, and grow sustainably and responsibly into the future. Our science is your advantage.

About The Team

We may not help develop smart homes of the future, inspect the New Year’s Eve ball or work in state-of-the-art labs… but we do tell people about it. It’s our brand, stories and campaigns that drive the growth of our business, open us up to new opportunities and let the world know how we’re making a difference. Our full-service team, which includes award-winning in-house creatives, collaborates to share ideas, tell our story and connect with people around the world. Join our team and spread the word about an organization that’s working at the forefront of innovation to shape a safer world.

title: Business Data Analyst
skills: Create an integrated database combining recruitment, engagement, orders, and distribution data.
Explore, clean, and structure large, unorganized datasets
Develop a metrics framework covering the entire funnel, from recruitment to recurrence.
Design and analyze experiments (A/B tests, causal inference)
Monitor and control unit economics.
Define calculation methodologies.
Build inventory forecasting models.
Support the Venture Manager in developing growth projections for the customer base and associated unit economics.
Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science bachelor’s degree
Strong proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, numpy)
Advanced SQL skills

description:
About the job

Overview

CAREERS TO SMILE ABOUT 

At PepsiCo, you’ll discover a place where our mission is to create smiles around the world. With a portfolio of more than 500 beloved brands including, Gatorade, Lay’s and Quaker, our work touches millions of people every day.

At the heart of the company is a team of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers who collaborate to innovate and turn ideas into action. Driven by innovation and a focus on creating joyful moments through food and drinks, our decisions are guided by consumer centricity, creating opportunities for our associates to do meaningful work and make a lasting impact in the communities we serve.

Whatever your role, you’ll be part of a global community that values your ideas and empowers you to make an impact, on your career and on the world around you.

Responsibilities

The Opportunity 

This role will transform complex data into actionable insights and predictive solutions that drive business decisions. This role combines strong statistical thinking, programming ability, and business acumen to design, build, and deploy data products and machine learning models in real environments.

Your Impact 

As Strategy Analyst your responsibilities would consist of


Create an integrated database combining recruitment, engagement, orders, and distribution data.
Explore, clean, and structure large, unorganized datasets
Develop a metrics framework covering the entire funnel, from recruitment to recurrence.
Design and analyze experiments (A/B tests, causal inference)
Monitor and control unit economics.
Define calculation methodologies.
Build inventory forecasting models.
Support the Venture Manager in developing growth projections for the customer base and associated unit economics.


Qualifications

¿Who Are We Looking For? 


Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science bachelor’s degree
Strong proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, numpy)
Advanced SQL skills
Solid understanding of statistics & probability
Experience with machine learning algorithms and model evaluation
Experience with data visualization tools and designing PowerBI dashboards
Clear communication with non-technical stakeholders
Structured problem solving
Curiosity and ownership
Results driven.
Work under pressure
Communication
Teamwork


If this is an opportunity that interests you, we encourage you to apply even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements. 

 

What can you expect from us: 


Opportunities to learn and develop every day through a wide range of programs. 
Internal digital platforms that promote self-learning. 
Development programs according to Leadership skills. 
Specialized training according to the role. 
Learning experiences with internal and external providers. 
We love to celebrate success, which is why we have recognition programs for seniority, behavior, leadership, moments of life, among others. 
Financial wellness programs that will help you reach your goals in all stages of life. 
A flexibility program that will allow you to balance your personal and work life, adapting your working day to your lifestyle. 
And because your family is also important to us, they can also enjoy benefits such as our Wellness Line, thousands of Agreements and Discounts, Scholarship programs for your children, Aid Plans for different moments of life, among others. 


 

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We respect and value diversity as a work force and innovation for the organization.

title: Sr. Manager, Branded Content Operations
skills: Serve as point of contact between Conde Nast’s internal talent group (TTG), Revenue team (Marketing and Sales), and Legal/Business Affairs team(s) for all client campaigns seeking to engage Employee talent.
Efficiently review and respond to complex talent requests for client campaigns to properly categorize, track and price based on specific needs of each campaign.
Liaise with Marketing, Sales and TTG to clarify requests as needed and ensure all trackers are up to date and accurate.
Coordinate within the People Team to clear employees for involvement in talent projects and maintain a database of cleared employee talent.
Complete social media checks on employee talent as part of clearance process

Liaise with the Legal/Business Affairs team on program details involving insurance and rights including drafting and processing employee talent riders, releases and other business/legal documents relating to the production of content and booking of employee talent
Liaise with key stakeholders in the Finance departments to manage/track/report all revenue and project/reconcile expenses
Administer and oversee workflow efficiencies; conduct internal training sessions on process as needed.
Some understanding of branded content as well as experience pricing talent for activations including, sponsorships, advertising, paid + organic social posts, video, events and native is preferred
4-6 years of business and legal experience preferred
Paralegal certification preferred
Strong communication skills, team player, eager to cooperate and collaborate with counterparts in the internal organization
Detailed-oriented, highly organized, ability to multi-task and deliver in a fast-paced sales environment.
Proven ability to manage relationships, problem-solve, and drive processes forward
description:
About the job

Condé Nast is a global media company producing the highest quality content with a footprint of more than 1 billion consumers in 32 territories through print, digital, video and social platforms. The company’s portfolio includes many of the world’s most respected and influential media properties including Vogue, Vanity Fair, Glamour, Self, GQ, The New Yorker, Condé Nast Traveler/Traveller, Allure, AD, Bon Appétit and Wired, among others.

Job Description

Location:

Ciudad de México, CMX

Overview/Primary Responsibilities:


Serve as point of contact between Conde Nast’s internal talent group (TTG), Revenue team (Marketing and Sales), and Legal/Business Affairs team(s) for all client campaigns seeking to engage Employee talent.
Efficiently review and respond to complex talent requests for client campaigns to properly categorize, track and price based on specific needs of each campaign.
Liaise with Marketing, Sales and TTG to clarify requests as needed and ensure all trackers are up to date and accurate.
 Coordinate within the People Team to clear employees for involvement in talent projects and maintain a database of cleared employee talent. 
Complete social media checks on employee talent as part of clearance process
Liaise with the Legal/Business Affairs team on program details involving insurance and rights including drafting and processing employee talent riders, releases and other business/legal documents relating to the production of content and booking of employee talent
Liaise with key stakeholders in the Finance departments to manage/track/report all revenue and project/reconcile expenses
Administer and oversee workflow efficiencies; conduct internal training sessions on process as needed.
Some understanding of branded content as well as experience pricing talent for activations including, sponsorships, advertising, paid + organic social posts, video, events and native is preferred


Requirements / Skills:


4-6 years of business and legal experience preferred
Paralegal certification preferred
Strong communication skills, team player, eager to cooperate and collaborate with counterparts in the internal organization
Detailed-oriented, highly organized, ability to multi-task and deliver in a fast-paced sales environment.
Proven ability to manage relationships, problem-solve, and drive processes forward


What happens next?

If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply below, and we will review your application as soon as possible. You can update your resume or upload a cover letter at any time by accessing your candidate profile.

Condé Nast is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, age, familial status and other legally protected characteristics.

title: Strategic Partnerships Jr Manager Natura Pay México
skills: Diseñar y ordenar la “cancha” de las alianzas: definir gobernanza, KPIs y dashboards, y coordinar el roll-out impecable de nuestros productos.

Ser el nexo entre Natura Pay y nuestros socios internos (principalmente, Natura Cosméticos), para garantizar que nuestra energía se traduzca en iniciativas claras y accionables en beneficio de nuestras consultoras de belleza.
Mantener relaciones cercanas con socios financieros y tecnológicos, alineando expectativas, seguimiento y resultados para que cada alianza funcione como un verdadero motor de crecimiento.

Apoyar directamente al Head de Natura Pay México y colaborar con equipos regionales para identificar y evaluar nuevas oportunidades de producto, canales y alianzas, traduciendo datos en decisiones que hagan crecer el negocio y la inclusión financiera de las consultoras.

5-7 años en servicios financieros o consultoría, fuerte músculo numérico, curiosidad genuina por entender a las consultoras y pasión por usar la tecnología para ampliar la inclusión financiera en México.

Habilidades de comunicación sobresaliente con públicos muy diversos: desde la fuerza de ventas hasta stakeholders técnicos y ejecutivos regionales. Queremos a alguien que disfrute traducir conversaciones complejas en acuerdos claros y accionables.

Licenciatura en Economía, Finanzas, Matemáticas, Actuaría, Administración o ingeniería afín; dominio sólido de software para análisis y visualización de datos; español nativo, inglés avanzado y se valora el portugués.
description:
About the job

SOMOS LIDERAZGO CON CONCIENCIA

En Natura, tenemos el potencial de impulsar transformaciones significativas. Esto es posible a través de los productos innovadores de Natura y Avon; las experiencias memorables de los servicios de belleza de Bluma y nuestra plataforma de educación financiera, Emana Pay. Marcas y servicios relevantes para quienes los utilizan y reconocidos por nuestro compromiso con la conducción de negocios regenerativos.

Ocupación

Permanente

¿Qué harás aquí?

Responsable de conectar a Natura Pay México con socios estratégicos internos y con nuestros aliados financieros y tecnológicos, para asegurar que los productos de pagos, crédito y ahorro lleguen a las consultoras de belleza de forma sencilla, segura y con propósito. Coordina la implementación de la estrategia de alianzas (gobernanza, KPIs, dashboards y roll-out de productos), gestiona la relación operativa con socios clave y apoya al Head de Natura Pay México en la identificación y evaluación de nuevas oportunidades de productos, canales y partnerships. Requiere 5–7 años de experiencia en servicios financieros o consultoría, licenciatura en Economía, Finanzas, Matemáticas, Actuaría, Administración o ingeniería afín, dominio de herramientas de análisis y visualización de datos y habilidades de comunicación sobresalientes en español e inglés para interactuar con fuerza de ventas, equipos técnicos y ejecutivos regionales.

¿Qué conocimientos y experiencias necesitarás traer para compartir con nuestra red?

En Natura Pay México buscamos a quien convierta cada interacción con nuestros socios en una historia de crecimiento e inclusión financiera para miles de consultoras de belleza. Como Strategic Partnerships Lead, serás la persona que conecta a Natura Pay con Natura Cosméticos y con nuestros aliados tecnológicos y financieros, para que cada uno de nuestros productos financieros llegue a las consultoras de manera sencilla, segura y con propósito.

Tu Misión Será


Diseñar y ordenar la “cancha” de las alianzas: definir gobernanza, KPIs y dashboards, y coordinar el roll-out impecable de nuestros productos.
Ser el nexo entre Natura Pay y nuestros socios internos (principalmente, Natura Cosméticos), para garantizar que nuestra energía se traduzca en iniciativas claras y accionables en beneficio de nuestras consultoras de belleza.
Mantener relaciones cercanas con socios financieros y tecnológicos, alineando expectativas, seguimiento y resultados para que cada alianza funcione como un verdadero motor de crecimiento.
Apoyar directamente al Head de Natura Pay México y colaborar con equipos regionales para identificar y evaluar nuevas oportunidades de producto, canales y alianzas, traduciendo datos en decisiones que hagan crecer el negocio y la inclusión financiera de las consultoras.


Buscamos a Alguien Con


5-7 años en servicios financieros o consultoría, fuerte músculo numérico, curiosidad genuina por entender a las consultoras y pasión por usar la tecnología para ampliar la inclusión financiera en México.
Habilidades de comunicación sobresaliente con públicos muy diversos: desde la fuerza de ventas hasta stakeholders técnicos y ejecutivos regionales. Queremos a alguien que disfrute traducir conversaciones complejas en acuerdos claros y accionables.
Licenciatura en Economía, Finanzas, Matemáticas, Actuaría, Administración o ingeniería afín; dominio sólido de software para análisis y visualización de datos; español nativo, inglés avanzado y se valora el portugués.


La creación de la posición de Strategic Partnerships Lead se justifica por el crecimiento del portafolio de productos financieros y del volumen de operaciones de Natura Pay México. Este puesto permitirá coordinar de forma dedicada la implementación de la estrategia de productos, así como el seguimiento a KPIs y a la relación con proveedores, asegurando una ejecución consistente que soporte los objetivos de crecimiento, rentabilidad e inclusión financiera de Natura Pay en México.

¿Qué encontrarás aquí?

Somos más que un lugar de trabajo: construimos y vivimos diariamente el Ecosistema Bien Estar Bien, basado en la relación armoniosa entre cada individuo, las relaciones a su alrededor y el entorno en el que está inmerso. Además de ofrecer beneficios enfocados en el bienestar social, físico, financiero, mental y emocional, promovemos un ambiente de prosperidad, pertenencia y propósito, fortaleciendo una red sólida de apoyo, expansión de la conciencia y respeto por la diversidad, equidad e inclusión.

Somos un movimiento que transforma la forma de vivir y hacer negocios en 14 países de América Latina, siempre guiados por la conciencia.

¿Conoces a alguien en Natura?

Si es así, solicita el correo corporativo de esa persona y, al postularte a una vacante, utilízalo para solicitar una recomendación. ¡Es una excelente oportunidad para fortalecer tu red de contactos y avanzar en tu proceso de selección con nosotros!

Natura celebra y abraza la diversidad en todas sus formas y pluralidades.

Invitamos a #Mujeres, #PersonasNegras, #PersonasConDiscapacidad, personas de la comunidad #LGBTQIA+, #MujeresEmbarazadas y personas con #50años+ a postularse para esta vacante.

description:
About the job

Why Work With Us?




We’re a fast-growing company that’s revolutionizing the world of data in Latin America!




CIAL Dun & Bradstreet is the leading commercial data and counterparty decisioning solutions provider across 43 countries in Latin America and the Caribbean. 




As the exclusive Latin American partner of the Dun & Bradstreet Worldwide Network, we serve 20,000+ customers with insights on 600M+ companies globally, combining the power of a world-class data network with deep local expertise built over decades in the region.




Our solutions help organizations make smarter faster decisions around credit risk, supply chain risk, compliance risk, to build stronger business relationships. 




The role




Support the growth, adoption, and visibility of the Trade program across key LATAM markets. This role provides hands-on support to the Trade leadership team by identifying growth opportunities, fostering internal adoption, supporting demand generation initiatives, and delivering qualified prospects to the Trade team. The role contributes to Trade growth through enablement, coordination, and opportunity generation in a B2B environment.




Identify and qualify potential companies to join the Trade program through research, opportunity assessment, and follow-up activities.

Drive internal Trade adoption and awareness by promoting the program across different business areas and supporting enablement initiatives.

Coordinate Trade-related marketing and communication activities, ensuring consistent visibility and engagement across internal and external channels.

Support the planning and execution of Trade events and training programs, including logistics, communications, materials, and participant follow-up.

Monitor performance and provide insights through reporting, analysis, and continuous improvement initiatives to support the growth of the Trade program.




Profile & Skills

Required:

Experience in business support, marketing, sales enablement, or similar roles.
Currently pursuing or holding a degree in Business Administration, International Business, International Trade, Public Relations, Communications, Marketing o related fields.
Strong organizational and coordination skills.
Proactive mindset with the ability to identify opportunities and propose ideas.
Ability to work with multiple stakeholders across countries.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).




Nice to have:

Experience supporting events, trainings, or internal communications.
Basic knowledge of CRM systems or pipeline tracking.
English proficiency.
Basic knowledge of Power BI or similar reporting tools.







CIAL provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws. This applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, and transfer, leaves of absence, compensation, and training.

description:
About the job

Beyond powers the business of short-term rentals with a best-in-class Revenue Management System used by thousands of property managers and owners around the world. We’re profitable, growing fast, and building with the latest technologies—including AI—to help our customers unlock more revenue with less effort. Behind our product is a global team of 180+ Beyonders who bring curiosity, craft, and care to everything we do. We believe people are the most important part of any business, starting with ours.

 

It's with that in mind that Beyond is looking to add a Senior Growth Marketing Manager to our growing team - our growth marketing team owns the full funnel from first touch through signup, connection, activation, and credit period. Reporting to the Director of Growth Marketing, you will have the opportunity to manage that funnel as a system. You will shape our organic presence, optimize our website and onboarding flows, help coordinate our paid media plan with an agency, and design experiments that move the metrics that matter: host acquisition, signup conversion, and activation. This is not a channel manager role. It is a full-funnel operator who thinks in growth loops, obsesses over the stories that resonate with their audience, builds in AI-native ways, and ships fast.

Before reading further...

Beyond is passionate about diversity and cultivating our team’s potential. If you’re hungry for a good opportunity, but don't meet every point in this job description, please apply anyway!

As our Senior Growth Marketing Manager, you'll be responsible for:

Organic & Content Distribution
Owning SEO, GEO, and AEO strategy across owned channels
Partnering on content creation; lead distribution, optimization, and performance
Managing organic social as a discovery and trust channel
Website & Conversion
Driving CRO across landing pages, signup flows, and onboarding entry points
Partnering with Product and Design to run tests and ship improvements
Identifying and close key conversion gaps
Acquisition
Supporting paid strategy alongside a specialized agency
Setting direction and ensure full-funnel message consistency
Aligning acquisition efforts to Host audience needs and experience
Activation & Credit Period Retention
Optimizing the signup-to-activation handoff
Partnering on onboarding flows to drive key host actions and milestones
Tracking cohorts and identify drop-off points during the credit period
Experimentation
Building and prioritizing the growth experiment backlog
Developing hypotheses, run tests, and analyze results
Turning insights into actionable channel and growth strategies
Analytics & Reporting
Owning funnel metrics from first touch through activation
Pulling and analyzing your own data; building reporting views
Connecting channel performance to downstream outcomes
Cross-functional Partnership
Collaborate closely with Product, Sales, and Revenue Management
Contribute to product launches, onboarding, and GTM execution
Use funnel insights to influence roadmap decisions

So what kind of person are we looking for in this role? The person who will be successful in this role will be: 

Communicative: You can clearly communicate and translate marketing performance into language the business acts on. 
AI-Native: You are comfortable using AI tools as part of your daily workflow across research, writing, building, and testing. You don’t treat AI as a checkbox—you use it to move faster and think better. You’re excited to engage with AI-powered onboarding and personalization as a hands-on practitioner, not just an observer.
An Owner: You take initiative and thrive when stepping into a well-defined problem space with existing momentum. You’re excited to own and build on top of established systems with experimentation frameworks, funnel analytics, and onboarding flows to drive them forward.

Now that we’ve told you what the job looks like, here are the qualifications we're looking for in a candidate: 

5+ years of experience in growth marketing, performance marketing, or demand generation, ideally in B2C or B2B SaaS environment 
A track record of improving search rankings and organic performance—not just producing content briefs
Experience working cross-functionally to ensure consistent messaging across the entire customer journey
Experience using Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to pull your own data and executing upon insights
Experience designing and running experiments end to end, from hypothesis to decision 
Proven ability to connect channel performance to business outcomes such as signups, activation, and retention—not just top-of-funnel metrics
Experience in the short-term rental, proptech, or hospitality space is a nice to have
Familiarity with SQL or similar data querying tools is a nice to have
Experience with HubSpot, additional CRMs and/or Webflow is a nice to have

 

So what can you expect after you apply? Your application will be personally reviewed by a member of the Beyond hiring team and if there is a match in your experience and the role, you will:

Have a video conversation with someone on our Recruiting team. This is a high-level conversation about your experience and interest, but also an opportunity for you to learn more about us
Meet with our Director of Growth Marketing 
Complete an assignment relevant to the role 
Present the assignment to a panel of stakeholders 
Have a final interview with our VP of Marketing and VP of Product
 

Company Values:

We are serious about our core values: We Care, We Are On the Same Team, We Inspire Trust, We Go Beyond, We Ship It, We're Curious. If those resonate with you, and you're ready to work with a team that lives and breathes those values, we want to hear from you. 


Benefits:

Beyond offers a wide variety of benefits like: stock options, unlimited PTO, private health insurance and more! You can learn more about our benefits by visiting our careers site!

We Care about Diversity, Equity and Inclusion:

Beyond is committed to building a workplace that attracts humans of all genders, ethnicities, backgrounds, statuses and lifestyles. At our core, we care about our people and encourage every employee, partner and applicant to share their whole self with us. We are respectful of and empathetic towards different viewpoints, and believe that our ability to help short term rental managers succeed relies on us building a dynamic and diverse team. Whoever you are, you can Belong @ Beyond.

AI Policy:

At Beyond, We Inspire Trust. In each other, in our process, and in the people we bring onto the team. As part of that commitment, we’re implementing clear guidelines around the use of AI in our recruitment processes. Please review the full policy here.

Any communication regarding job openings, interviews and/or offers will come from our @beyondpricing.com email domain

Please review our GDPR Statement here.

title: Business Intelligence Senior Analyst
skills: Works directly with internal customers to refine requirements and validate output to ensure solutions will meet expectations.
Apply technical knowledge to translate business needs into BI solutions
Develop and improve user learning materials, FAQs, checklists that fosters self-service and self-sufficiency
Conduct moderate to complex data profiling and analysis to evaluate data sources to determine the best source for business information
Acquiring, transforming and translating data into actionable dashboards, reports, or datasets that has a substantial impact on the functional area of support
Performing moderate to complex statistical analysis to investigate issues and present recommendations to stakeholders that build trust with the dashboards
Collaborate with data engineers and business users to perform data validation and testing activities as appropriate
Develop and build upon existing expertise of the data ecosystem (data lake) as well as emerging trends in business intelligence technologies (e.g. AI, Conversational BI, Generative BI)
Develop and maintain BI platform operations and administration procedures, checklists, and runbooks for a global support team

Demonstrated ability to translate business needs into technical solutions. Ability to embrace change, adapt to the unexpected, and focus energies, people, and solutions on practical and positive results
Demonstrated problem solving skills with practical and creative solutions. Strong communications skills with the ability to influence various levels of leaders using data and logic
Aptitude and drive to learn new technologies, frameworks, and analysis techniques (e.g. AI, Semantics, conversational BI, Generative BI)
Is comfortable taking ownership for the design & implementation of technical solutions
Strong team player; able to work effectively within a team and more broadly with people from a variety of backgrounds, locations, and functional areas.
Advance the standardization of BI dashboards and metrics for consistency and scalability
Clearly document BI procedures, runbooks, checklists, onboarding, and tools (e.g. Jira, Lucid, Confluence)
Support Self-service BI training campaigns, enablement guides, FAQs, and delivery
Support the Business Glossary, Data Dictionary, Metadata Catalog, Semantic layer, and BI (Reports) Catalog
Manage BI Support forums (Slack, Mailbox, Zendesk tickets) with consistency and scalability
Bachelor Degree in Information Systems preferred, and/or equivalent experience

5+ years experience with demonstrated success at a BI Analyst II, BI Senior Analyst level or comparable data analytics related field, in an organization with large-scale Business Intelligence and Reporting operations
Excellent knowledge of analytics programming languages (SQL/Python) and tools (Looker, Looker Studio, Tableau)
In-depth understanding of data profiling, statistical analysis and data modeling concepts
Adept in extracting and leveraging data out of data warehouse, transactional databases, object stores & API based environments
Demonstrable experience leading large multi-functional BI projects
Player/coach, hands-on, collaborative and strong interest in building new capabilities and BI team from the ground up
Proven track record navigating, collaborating, and influencing business stakeholders to deliver BI solutions
Good knowledge and experience in BI, Reporting, visualization principles, practices, and standards
Ability to travel less than 5% of the time (e.g. US or EU offices)
description:
About the job

Job Description

Who we're looking for

Zendesk’s Enterprise Business Intelligence & Reporting team is seeking a proactive, motivated, creative, and experienced BI professional to support a portfolio of enterprise dashboards using modern BI approaches, frameworks, and governance principles to enable scalable self-service capabilities and standards with Tableau, Looker, and Snowflake. This role requires a broad mix of business and technical savvy, collaboration, influencing decisions, and effective communication skills with key internal partners at all levels. This is your chance to build enterprise BI capabilities with a modern data stack (SaaS ecosystem) during Zendesk’s evolution.

This role will be a technical expert responsible for eliciting requirements, conducting data analysis, recommending BI solutions, and building insightful visualizations. They will also guide, advise, and enable stakeholders to effectively use our BI tools, to translate data into meaningful insights for teams and leaders to confidently take action on. The ideal candidate will be passionate about all things data, dashboards, and visualizations. This position will work closely with Business Analysts, Data Analysts, Data Scientists, Data Engineers and directly with the business units for requirements gathering, validation, and support. The BI Lead (Senior Analyst) also plays a critical role in guiding the work and mentoring of other BI Analysts to ensure we are meeting objectives and growing future talent within our BI team.

What you'll be doing


Works directly with internal customers to refine requirements and validate output to ensure solutions will meet expectations. 
Apply technical knowledge to translate business needs into BI solutions
Develop and improve user learning materials, FAQs, checklists that fosters self-service and self-sufficiency
Conduct moderate to complex data profiling and analysis to evaluate data sources to determine the best source for business information
Acquiring, transforming and translating data into actionable dashboards, reports, or datasets that has a substantial impact on the functional area of support
Performing moderate to complex statistical analysis to investigate issues and present recommendations to stakeholders that build trust with the dashboards
Collaborate with data engineers and business users to perform data validation and testing activities as appropriate
Develop and build upon existing expertise of the data ecosystem (data lake) as well as emerging trends in business intelligence technologies (e.g. AI, Conversational BI, Generative BI)
Develop and maintain BI platform operations and administration procedures, checklists, and runbooks for a global support team


Job Specifications


Demonstrated ability to translate business needs into technical solutions. Ability to embrace change, adapt to the unexpected, and focus energies, people, and solutions on practical and positive results
Demonstrated problem solving skills with practical and creative solutions. Strong communications skills with the ability to influence various levels of leaders using data and logic
Aptitude and drive to learn new technologies, frameworks, and analysis techniques (e.g. AI, Semantics, conversational BI, Generative BI)
Is comfortable taking ownership for the design & implementation of technical solutions
Strong team player; able to work effectively within a team and more broadly with people from a variety of backgrounds, locations, and functional areas.
Advance the standardization of BI dashboards and metrics for consistency and scalability
Clearly document BI procedures, runbooks, checklists, onboarding, and tools (e.g. Jira, Lucid, Confluence)
Support Self-service BI training campaigns, enablement guides, FAQs, and delivery
Support the Business Glossary, Data Dictionary, Metadata Catalog, Semantic layer, and BI (Reports) Catalog
Manage BI Support forums (Slack, Mailbox, Zendesk tickets) with consistency and scalability


What You Bring To The Role (Required Qualifications)


Bachelor Degree in Information Systems preferred, and/or equivalent experience
5+ years experience with demonstrated success at a BI Analyst II, BI Senior Analyst level or comparable data analytics related field, in an organization with large-scale Business Intelligence and Reporting operations
Excellent knowledge of analytics programming languages (SQL/Python) and tools (Looker, Looker Studio, Tableau)
In-depth understanding of data profiling, statistical analysis and data modeling concepts
Adept in extracting and leveraging data out of data warehouse, transactional databases, object stores & API based environments
Demonstrable experience leading large multi-functional BI projects
Player/coach, hands-on, collaborative and strong interest in building new capabilities and BI team from the ground up
Proven track record navigating, collaborating, and influencing business stakeholders to deliver BI solutions 
Good knowledge and experience in BI, Reporting, visualization principles, practices, and standards
Ability to travel less than 5% of the time (e.g. US or EU offices)


Please note that anyone hired into this position must be physically located in and plan to work from Mexico City (CDMX) or Mexico State (Estado de Mexico).

Hybrid: In this role, our hybrid experience is designed at the team level to give you a rich onsite experience packed with connection, collaboration, learning, and celebration - while also giving you flexibility to work remotely for part of the week. This role must attend our local office for part of the week. The specific in-office schedule is to be determined by the hiring manager.

The Intelligent Heart Of Customer Experience

Zendesk software was built to bring a sense of calm to the chaotic world of customer service. Today we power billions of conversations with brands you know and love.

Zendesk believes in offering our people a fulfilling and inclusive experience. Our hybrid way of working, enables us to purposefully come together in person, at one of our many Zendesk offices around the world, to connect, collaborate and learn whilst also giving our people the flexibility to work remotely for part of the week.

As part of our commitment to fairness and transparency, we inform all applicants that artificial intelligence (AI) or automated decision systems may be used to screen or evaluate applications for this position, in accordance with Company guidelines and applicable law.

Zendesk is an equal opportunity employer, and we’re proud of our ongoing efforts to foster global diversity, equity, & inclusion in the workplace. Individuals seeking employment and employees at Zendesk are considered without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We are an AA/EEO/Veterans/Disabled employer. If you are based in the United States and would like more information about your EEO rights under the law, please click here.

Zendesk endeavors to make reasonable accommodations for applicants with disabilities and disabled veterans pursuant to applicable federal and state law. If you are an individual with a disability and require a reasonable accommodation to submit this application, complete any pre-employment testing, or otherwise participate in the employee selection process, please send an e-mail to peopleandplaces@zendesk.com with your specific accommodation request.

description:
About the job

Overview

A Business Analyst (BA) acts as a bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams to identify reporting and analytics needs, analyze operational processes, and deliver data-driven solutions. The BA ensures that business goals are translated into accurate requirements and actionable insights through reports, dashboards, and analytics products that improve decision-making and operational efficiency.

All interviews will be conducted in English.

Responsibilities


 Requirements Gathering & Documentation
 Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify operational reporting needs, KPIs, and success criteria. 
 Conduct interviews, workshops, and requirement sessions to capture functional and non-functional requirements. 
 Document detailed business requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria, and process flows in tools such as Jira or Confluence. 
 Data & Reporting Analysis
 Translate business needs into specifications for reports, dashboards, and analytics solutions. 
 Work with data engineering and BI teams to validate source-to-report data mapping, ensuring accuracy and completeness. 
 Analyze and profile source system data to confirm reporting feasibility and data quality. 
 Stakeholder Engagement & Communication
 Act as a liaison between business units and technical teams, ensuring requirements are clearly understood and delivered. 
 Present findings, insights, and recommendations in clear business language. 
 Support stakeholder training and adoption of new reports, dashboards, or analytics solutions. 
 Operational Reporting Development Support
 Partner with BI developers to design effective operational reports and dashboards (using tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or MicroStrategy). 
 Perform functional testing and validation of developed reports against requirements. 
 Ensure consistent use of business definitions, metrics, and reporting standards across deliverables. 
 Process Improvement & Governance
 Identify opportunities for improving operational processes and reporting workflows. 
 Support adherence to data governance, security, and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, PHI/PII safeguards in healthcare). 
 Contribute to the development of reporting best practices and documentation standards. 
 Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting. 
 Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned. 

This job description is intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed and is not to be construed as an exhaustive list of responsibilities, duties and skills required. This job description does not constitute an employment agreement and is subject to change as the needs of Cotiviti and requirements of the job change.

Qualifications


 Education & Experience 
 Fully bi-Lingual (both written and verbal). 
 Bachelor’s degree in Business, Data Analytics, Information Systems, or a related field (Master’s preferred). 
 3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst, preferably in operational reporting, data analytics, or a healthcare payer environment. 
 Experience working in Agile/SAFe environments with Epics, User Stories, and backlogs. 
 Technical Skills 
 Strong proficiency in requirement documentation tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence, MS Office/Visio). 
 Working knowledge of SQL for querying and validating data. 
 Familiarity with BI/reporting platforms such as Tableau, Power BI, or MicroStrategy. (Preferred). 
 Understanding of data warehouses, relational databases (Oracle, Hadoop), and data pipelines (Preferred). 
 Core Competencies 
 Strong analytical and critical-thinking skills, with the ability to translate business questions into data-driven solutions. 
 Excellent communication and presentation skills, able to engage both technical and non-technical audiences. 
 Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy, data quality, and documentation completeness. 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced operational reporting environment. 
 Collaborative mindset with a focus on teamwork, transparency, and continuous improvement. 

 Base compensation ranges from $29,000 to $34,000 pesos per month. Specific offers are determined by various factors, such as experience, education, skills, certifications, and other business needs. 

 Cotiviti offers team members a competitive benefits package to address a wide range of personal and family needs.
